| | Dear Fellow Conservative,
---
| | I'm writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.Actually, in my case, it's a slippery _slide_. My name is Riley Gaines and I'm the University of Kentucky swimmer who had to compete against a fully intact 6'4" _male_ swimmer dressed in a women's bathing suit.And after he stole the victory I had worked for my entire life, I had to go back to the women's locker room and undress out of my wet bathing suit while he did the same next to me.
---
| [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=bb47bb618e8840469adc54ef84f51f4a&_e=-iPOQnTo6gg6JU-cgaFqBsNaiu9GIoiJHSohgdcXG0Ubm-nNcasiG2xwobTwRaFqu2knM7NmdWkcuywsFxlc5zahlUI4d8dQkGteHRFHkunQ2A-0BIPCQgD7XnM77CZzQ_QKZCIov5k9IMF3UdZTRGUDB8y0SY_f6ADJUVkd1y4uotUKk9TTFJwtjmDG7hDy7kIwSVrb3TRSOeagJFqKvjeGmmw2AFBbwvxvfcNkWjIwtBsXubrPwfFfvrtol_WHIRIk-WgiVqdiVLN9u0CHXXhFZMMzB37_1z3-aiCfUTUj9-oaolefJQoUC9b55eQAXBOWCZFKxUP6SzvE-UlHlgYOD8rCHM2hT9mJfLETwSFu4pKdR5f9X9WOsrIq5z_Bu5jJyI-O2CtWqbhggH9S5g%3D%3D)

| | I know the images I'm bringing up are horrible. But please don't stop reading -- because God-fearing, faith-filled people like you and me have a job to do today. We can't retreat into our homes and hope our government's evil culture just passes us by. **[That's why I'm asking you to stand with me today -- before it's too late.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=bb47bb618e8840469adc54ef84f51f4a&_e=-iPOQnTo6gg6JU-cgaFqBsNaiu9GIoiJHSohgdcXG0Ubm-nNcasiG2xwobTwRaFqu2knM7NmdWkcuywsFxlc5zahlUI4d8dQkGteHRFHkunQ2A-0BIPCQgD7XnM77CZzQ_QKZCIov5k9IMF3UdZTRGUDB8y0SY_f6ADJUVkd1y4uotUKk9TTFJwtjmDG7hDy7kIwSVrb3TRSOeagJFqKvjeGmmw2AFBbwvxvfcNkWjIwtBsXubrPwfFfvrtol_WHSwEwusye9nJbt0hjQrxwGSfS8ZTir69hsqBfBreLuxUTuDOn9p4NTjvZ8c70XWERk9bdDKvUSEG5-jVoDDDQu-oKnIYXfVicLCr5w3dLYMThsmyDBdfVWUeSV7GiaEUXwY3XObtI6LqTMSaCYeCQNQ%3D%3D)** My fellow conservative, you know this slippery slide.It's the same one you got pushed down when the Left told you abortion was going to be "safe, legal, and rare."_Now abortion is a "right" and "women’s healthcare." And if you don’t support it up until the moment of birth, you must "hate women."_ It's the same slippery slide you got pushed down when the Left told you limiting gay couples to civil unions was "mean." You were told, "They just want to use the word "marriage" like everyone else. It's just a word."_Now if you don't fully embrace a homosexual lifestyle by displaying rainbows and celebrating gay pride, you're a "hate-filled bigot."_ Enough with their lies. We have Truth on our side. And we need to start acting like it.**God created man. And God created woman. It isn't any more complicated than that.** Letting men believe they are women... letting girls believe they are boys... is a bold-faced rejection of God’s truth. And if we give this deranged movement one more inch, a year from now when you're forced by law to call boys "she"... when it becomes normal for kids to be taken away from parents who oppose this evil... I don't want you looking back with regret wishing you had done something when you still had a chance.**Your chance is right now -- and right by my side.** **[Please stand with me against the radical transgender movement by making an urgent tax-deductible donation today -- before it's too late.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=bb47bb618e8840469adc54ef84f51f4a&_e=-iPOQnTo6gg6JU-cgaFqBsNaiu9GIoiJHSohgdcXG0Ubm-nNcasiG2xwobTwRaFqu2knM7NmdWkcuywsFxlc5zahlUI4d8dQkGteHRFHkunQ2A-0BIPCQgD7XnM77CZzQ_QKZCIov5k9IMF3UdZTRGUDB8y0SY_f6ADJUVkd1y4uotUKk9TTFJwtjmDG7hDy7kIwSVrb3TRSOeagJFqKvjeGmmw2AFBbwvxvfcNkWjIwtBsXubrPwfFfvrtol_WHax-RDGOF6KKCyOhMZ3qKyJBxZ9BptCycdc29jrGHOKD_ll62Qr23jQ5pBXz-J4QCqWjx7vJ736_PTaQoq5HS0m-oCq5mQJzOoyX5sxId3TTM_IyFp7JkSshf_1nWWKHMcamxUXI2X6TvPCVlgHD3Eg%3D%3D) ** Maybe you're thinking like so many, "Riley, adults are free to do whatever they want. And children should be kept away from this evil by their parents."I agree this problem would have less traction if parents just said, "No."
---
>> But parents in MD had their child taken away because they refused to let their son transition to a "girl." >> Parents in Vermont are seeing their foster care licenses revoked because they admit they would not help a child who may be assigned to their home get puberty blockers or have sex change surgery.>> Parents in California got themselves elected to the school board, passed guidelines to protect their children from the transgender movement, and now the state of California is suing them. >> And Illinois is considering a bill that would change the definition of "child abuse" to include parents who oppose puberty blocking drugs and sex change operations.

The radical transgender movement has parents backed into a corner. But when I'm speaking around the country, I meet so many seniors who say, "I wish someone had told me about this sooner." The good news is that right now, you still have a chance to help me stop the radical transgender movement before they push us down their slippery slide.And today I'm writing you on behalf of a group that is doing more work to block the transgender movement than anyone I know. **It's the legal non-profit the Center for American Liberty.** **[And your tax-deductible gift today is going straight to help them.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=bb47bb618e8840469adc54ef84f51f4a&_e=-iPOQnTo6gg6JU-cgaFqBsNaiu9GIoiJHSohgdcXG0Ubm-nNcasiG2xwobTwRaFqu2knM7NmdWkcuywsFxlc5zahlUI4d8dQkGteHRFHkunQ2A-0BIPCQgD7XnM77CZzQ_QKZCIov5k9IMF3UdZTRGUDB8y0SY_f6ADJUVkd1y4uotUKk9TTFJwtjmDG7hDy7kIwSVrb3TRSOeagJFqKvjeGmmw2AFBbwvxvfcNkWjIwtBsXubrPwfFfvrtol_WHnHklDO4uajn0lR9BYU6FyFMb46rVrwSYgc_oUJ68nzr2XmesVrybDNsSq13lNB0immwdiexUItihpkeCOdWPn7OmmfI7P2GvkNPqegEYb6SiIOvDwxFO2Fr7c27uQBVFhMx1nrm937Z3P6RwJJWAzw%3D%3D)** With the help of patriots like you, the _Center for American Liberty_ fights the transgender movement _in the courts_ because that’s the only way to stop them. And the _Center for American Liberty_ is attacking this evil from all sides with their comprehensive three-pronged approach.

**#1. They're fighting radical schools**.

I know it may sound crazy to you but in today's taxpayer-funded schools, teachers and counselors _encourage_ young children to socially "transition" at school and then facilitate the "transition" by giving children new names and even giving them new clothes so they can dress as the opposite sex.And they keep it all a secret from parents! And they already have one major win! **[When you make your tax-deductible gift today](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=bb47bb618e8840469adc54ef84f51f4a&_e=-iPOQnTo6gg6JU-cgaFqBsNaiu9GIoiJHSohgdcXG0Ubm-nNcasiG2xwobTwRaFqu2knM7NmdWkcuywsFxlc5zahlUI4d8dQkGteHRFHkunQ2A-0BIPCQgD7XnM77CZzQ_QKZCIov5k9IMF3UdZTRGUDB8y0SY_f6ADJUVkd1y4uotUKk9TTFJwtjmDG7hDy7kIwSVrb3TRSOeagJFqKvjeGmmw2AFBbwvxvfcNkWjIwtBsXubrPwfFfvrtol_WHOH2BiufMaNtX1Iyyft7fpKa8NKZ-R_SNKU06z5pzTwNEpOWgpTcf88QECF4S5ZHMGbi3Qrm5w2ONYq82u1i63Hbkj91hpkGdHRIqn6JpMI9EVCv7C5R8gMtWKH7x7wT_jqrBFtikNdcku26eZl7Nyw%3D%3D), **you're making sure PARENTS have the final word in guiding their children -- not school radicals!

**#2. They're fighting radical doctors.**

There are doctors who mutilate children for profit in the name of transgender "care." They use their "expertise" to convince _even_ _conservative_ _parents_ that if they oppose "transition," their child will commit suicide.Then these doctors pump children full of dangerous puberty blockers and perform gruesome surgeries to remove children's healthy breasts and other parts. Maybe you've seen a girl named Chloe Cole on Fox News. In a landmark case, the _Center for American Liberty_ is helping her sue the radical doctors and hospital that gave her a double mastectomy at age 15. **[**When you make your tax-deductible gift today**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=bb47bb618e8840469adc54ef84f51f4a&_e=-iPOQnTo6gg6JU-cgaFqBsNaiu9GIoiJHSohgdcXG0Ubm-nNcasiG2xwobTwRaFqu2knM7NmdWkcuywsFxlc5zahlUI4d8dQkGteHRFHkunQ2A-0BIPCQgD7XnM77CZzQ_QKZCIov5k9IMF3UdZTRGUDB8y0SY_f6ADJUVkd1y4uotUKk9TTFJwtjmDG7hDy7kIwSVrb3TRSOeagJFqKvjeGmmw2AFBbwvxvfcNkWjIwtBsXubrPwfFfvrtol_WHZW39CUZ3Xfn6589cmhjCdn13DHsws9iwugxtagbZ6cHaJlu0zXVlBHs5P0tEvHY7NlmNAH0OVJq5F86hPdgS1m6rr15vKha3G8mYoX4ko0mOBIhhqrNWfSG-Bu-9pzC1dmpCfh65nYWgZhpYT9Wmzg%3D%3D)** , you're helping Chloe and the _Center for American Liberty_ make sure this never happens to another child!

Fighting for Freedom of Speech is one of the _Center for American Liberty's_ specialties and they've notched plenty of victories in this space. Their next one is going to be fighting for an 82-year-old grandmother who got banned for life from the YMCA.This grandma raised the alarm that a grown man dressed in a women's bathing suit was in the women's locker room "helping" two little girls get ready to use the bathroom.And she was the one punished!**[**When you make your tax-deductible gift today**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=bb47bb618e8840469adc54ef84f51f4a&_e=-iPOQnTo6gg6JU-cgaFqBsNaiu9GIoiJHSohgdcXG0Ubm-nNcasiG2xwobTwRaFqu2knM7NmdWkcuywsFxlc5zahlUI4d8dQkGteHRFHkunQ2A-0BIPCQgD7XnM77CZzQ_QKZCIov5k9IMF3UdZTRGUDB8y0SY_f6ADJUVkd1y4uotUKk9TTFJwtjmDG7hDy7kIwSVrb3TRSOeagJFqKvjeGmmw2AFBbwvxvfcNkWjIwtBsXubrPwfFfvrtol_WHfdHWr_BZ3CEnxdp26tisfTXGmsXeW_ESAru2z4xvg6dsIPG2Oo1m8uthf39nmnpzIyL0NGNbGR6fiEDDAQ_U6PqCd3K_1cN0PlBm9DIs76_kc_x1Bv6QZYvCZsfSdEqt2hPi-AVcNsFI87WEeD9YDw%3D%3D)** , you're helping the _Center for American Liberty_ protect every American's right to speak out against this evil! I know you'd probably love to fund an entire court case on your own after all I've told you.**[But all I'm asking you to do is make a tax-deductible gift of $30, $50, $75, $100 or even $250 or more today -- before it's too late.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=bb47bb618e8840469adc54ef84f51f4a&_e=-iPOQnTo6gg6JU-cgaFqBsNaiu9GIoiJHSohgdcXG0Ubm-nNcasiG2xwobTwRaFqu2knM7NmdWkcuywsFxlc5zahlUI4d8dQkGteHRFHkunQ2A-0BIPCQgD7XnM77CZzQ_QKZCIov5k9IMF3UdZTRGUDB8y0SY_f6ADJUVkd1y4uotUKk9TTFJwtjmDG7hDy7kIwSVrb3TRSOeagJFqKvjeGmmw2AFBbwvxvfcNkWjIwtBsXubrPwfFfvrtol_WH0ccCf3oefTHMthXM9eKk8l1Jddyaj941FuQdOSLkrGIXw1jM7UswrZV1E0L35ZqnRp683cIf1OsEuXW0_IGF8euBWzRzMHnWRTYR9fg3O38qk-pUQyUwf_LwawhDkl-ylvFSzPBkN88F_0Y8trWapA%3D%3D)** Please donate whatever amount is right for you whether it's smaller or larger. _The Center for American Liberty_ needs and appreciates every dollar that comes in.And because I believe so strongly in the work they're doing -- and because they are one of the few groups who've stood shoulder-to-shoulder with me in this fight... I**t will be my honor to send you my new book _Swimming Against the Current: Fighting for Common Sense in a World That's Lost Its Mind_ as my free gift** **[**when you donate $100 or more to the Center for American Liberty.**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=bb47bb618e8840469adc54ef84f51f4a&_e=-iPOQnTo6gg6JU-cgaFqBsNaiu9GIoiJHSohgdcXG0Ubm-nNcasiG2xwobTwRaFqu2knM7NmdWkcuywsFxlc5zahlUI4d8dQkGteHRFHkunQ2A-0BIPCQgD7XnM77CZzQ_QKZCIov5k9IMF3UdZTRGUDB8y0SY_f6ADJUVkd1y4uotUKk9TTFJwtjmDG7hDy7kIwSVrb3TRSOeagJFqKvjeGmmw2AFBbwvxvfcNkWjIwtBsXubrPwfFfvrtol_WH2m6QTNDycqOg-U9u14mJG9rPEUdrX1iSkAaEtKfPkL2kZb6umayi0YBeXTEFdvPXmt77ikls1IAnc4JmIAc5p6o_FXkve5vUNhDoQjTfvFx1BTAqAtv3mIEMQc5pyA73DM4kEB1Bw9gPWK26BaOnyg%3D%3D)** Before I go, please let me share one last thought with you.Every morning as a competitive swimmer, I would get up and think of this verse: _For I consider that the sufferings of the present time are not worthy to be compared to the glory that is about to be revealed to us. Romans 8:18_ I applied it to my swimming: work hard now and wins come later. But now I see that God has a much bigger plan for my life just as He does for yours.Thank you for reading my letter all the way to the end. I'm praying for you, and I hope you'll pray for me too.

clean_body: There are doctors who mutilate children for profit in the name of transgender "care." They use their "expertise" to convince even conservative parents that if they oppose "transition," their child will commit suicide. | | | | I’m writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope. | | | | | | Dear Fellow Conservative, | | I'm writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.Actually, in my case, it's a slippery slide. My name is Riley Gaines and I'm the University of Kentucky swimmer who had to compete against a fully intact 6'4" male swimmer dressed in a women's bathing suit.And after he stole the victory I had worked for my entire life, I had to go back to the women's locker room and undress out of my wet bathing suit while he did the same next to me. | | | I know the images I'm bringing up are horrible. But please don't stop reading -- because God-fearing, faith-filled people like you and me have a job to do today. We can't retreat into our homes and hope our government's evil culture just passes us by. My fellow conservative, you know this slippery slide.It's the same one you got pushed down when the Left told you abortion was going to be "safe, legal, and rare."Now abortion is a "right" and "women’s healthcare." And if you don’t support it up until the moment of birth, you must "hate women." It's the same slippery slide you got pushed down when the Left told you limiting gay couples to civil unions was "mean." You were told, "They just want to use the word "marriage" like everyone else. It's just a word."Now if you don't fully embrace a homosexual lifestyle by displaying rainbows and celebrating gay pride, you're a "hate-filled bigot." Enough with their lies. We have Truth on our side. And we need to start acting like it.God created man. And God created woman. It isn't any more complicated than that. Letting men believe they are women... letting girls believe they are boys... is a bold-faced rejection of God’s truth. And if we give this deranged movement one more inch, a year from now when you're forced by law to call boys "she"... when it becomes normal for kids to be taken away from parents who oppose this evil... I don't want you looking back with regret wishing you had done something when you still had a chance.Your chance is right now -- and right by my side. Maybe you're thinking like so many, "Riley, adults are free to do whatever they want. And children should be kept away from this evil by their parents."I agree this problem would have less traction if parents just said, "No." > But parents in MD had their child taken away because they refused to let their son transition to a "girl." >> Parents in Vermont are seeing their foster care licenses revoked because they admit they would not help a child who may be assigned to their home get puberty blockers or have sex change surgery.>> Parents in California got themselves elected to the school board, passed guidelines to protect their children from the transgender movement, and now the state of California is suing them. >> And Illinois is considering a bill that would change the definition of "child abuse" to include parents who oppose puberty blocking drugs and sex change operations. The radical transgender movement has parents backed into a corner. But when I'm speaking around the country, I meet so many seniors who say, "I wish someone had told me about this sooner." The good news is that right now, you still have a chance to help me stop the radical transgender movement before they push us down their slippery slide.And today I'm writing you on behalf of a group that is doing more work to block the transgender movement than anyone I know. It's the legal non-profit the Center for American Liberty. With the help of patriots like you, the Center for American Liberty fights the transgender movement in the courts because that’s the only way to stop them. And the Center for American Liberty is attacking this evil from all sides with their comprehensive three-pronged approach. #1. They're fighting radical schools. I know it may sound crazy to you but in today's taxpayer-funded schools, teachers and counselors encourage young children to socially "transition" at school and then facilitate the "transition" by giving children new names and even giving them new clothes so they can dress as the opposite sex.And they keep it all a secret from parents! The Center for American Liberty is taking these radicals to court in multiple cases. And they already have one major win! , you're making sure PARENTS have the final word in guiding their children -- not school radicals! #2. They're fighting radical doctors. There are doctors who mutilate children for profit in the name of transgender "care." They use their "expertise" to convince even conservative parents that if they oppose "transition," their child will commit suicide.Then these doctors pump children full of dangerous puberty blockers and perform gruesome surgeries to remove children's healthy breasts and other parts. Maybe you've seen a girl named Chloe Cole on Fox News. In a landmark case, the Center for American Liberty is helping her sue the radical doctors and hospital that gave her a double mastectomy at age 15. , you're helping Chloe and the Center for American Liberty make sure this never happens to another child! #3. They're fighting for your right to speak out against this evil. Fighting for Freedom of Speech is one of the Center for American Liberty's specialties and they've notched plenty of victories in this space. Their next one is going to be fighting for an 82-year-old grandmother who got banned for life from the YMCA.This grandma raised the alarm that a grown man dressed in a women's bathing suit was in the women's locker room "helping" two little girls get ready to use the bathroom.And she was the one punished! , you're helping the Center for American Liberty protect every American's right to speak out against this evil! I know you'd probably love to fund an entire court case on your own after all I've told you. Please donate whatever amount is right for you whether it's smaller or larger. The Center for American Liberty needs and appreciates every dollar that comes in.And because I believe so strongly in the work they're doing -- and because they are one of the few groups who've stood shoulder-to-shoulder with me in this fight... It will be my honor to send you my new book Swimming Against the Current: Fighting for Common Sense in a World That's Lost Its Mind as my free gift Before I go, please let me share one last thought with you.Every morning as a competitive swimmer, I would get up and think of this verse: For I consider that the sufferings of the present time are not worthy to be compared to the glory that is about to be revealed to us. Romans 8:18 I applied it to my swimming: work hard now and wins come later. But now I see that God has a much bigger plan for my life just as He does for yours.Thank you for reading my letter all the way to the end. I'm praying for you, and I hope you'll pray for me too. Sincerely, | | Riley Gaines | | | P.S. God made man and God made woman. The attempts to deny those basic truths, are attempts to deny the truth of God. Your help is so critical to the Center for American Liberty's work, Please hurry. It's getting hard to hold back this evil without you. I don't want you to look back a year from now and say, "I wish I had done something when I had the chance." | | | | | | | ---|---|--- The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization fighting against growing anti-free speech and anti-civil liberties trends. © The Center for American Liberty | PO Box 200942, Pittsburgh, PA 15251

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Reflections on the election
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
|
Hi Derek,
It has only been a couple of weeks since the election, and like the rest of the post-pandemic-period, my sense of time is much skewed — it seems like it has been two years since the country voted to return Donald Trump to office along with Republican majorities in the House and Senate.
There has already been a lot of commentary about what went wrong, and how a candidate as morally and legally flawed as Donald Trump could have been so successful. And there will be a lot more insights to come that will shape our thinking about what the Democratic Party needs to do to reclaim the popular support of the American people.
But I do believe certain conclusions can already be reached. First, this was not an election over policy, or if it was, only in the most general sense. Trump had very few articulated policy positions, and most of them were deeply unpopular. The border may be the lone exception, but even there, the extremity of his views, the demonization of all immigrants and calls for mass deportation, were less popular than his critique that the border was a crisis that needed to be addressed. Harris’s policies were far more popular, and while some commentators urged greater specificity over her economic plans, when she provided it, no one seemed interested.
This was also not a race about the quality of the candidates and their performance on the campaign trail. Harris wiped the floor with Trump during their only televised debate, and she was disciplined, thoughtful, personable, and popular with audiences. By contrast, Trump was his usual untethered self, more than usual in fact, with his repetitive, insult and grievance-filled low-energy rallies, lengthy music sway-ins, excretions about “people eating dogs and cats,” the Madison Square Garden debacle, and more.
Democrats were up against a very strong anti-incumbent wave that broke all over the world, where incumbent governments were ousted, whether they were left, right, or center. Nevertheless, Democrats need to think critically about why we were not able to overcome this wave, and what we can do to reclaim the majority — and not just reclaim it, but build a majority that is durable.
I think the race came down to two things: many swing voters felt poorly about the economy and wanted a change, and they had a sense that Trump got people like them. They were not confident Democrats were the change agents or could address the structural problems plaguing the economy. When people start to feel that the quality of life their parents enjoyed was better than what they have or worry that their children will be even less well off, all too many are ready to entertain any demagogue who comes along promising that they alone can fix it. These voters also didn’t feel part of the Democratic coalition or that we were speaking to them about things they cared about, and doing so respectfully.
Both of these deficits can be overcome, and must be if we are to save our democracy. Through his nomination of such seriously flawed candidates for cabinet posts as (the now former AG candidate) Matt Gaetz, Tulsi Gabbard, RFK Jr., and more, Trump has settled one question already — for all the speculation that he might be a different kind of president in his second term, concerned about his legacy and not running again — he has shown that he will be a different kind of president, worse.
During my campaign, I focused extensively on the economy and the problem, decades-long in the making, that people are working harder than ever and still struggling to get by, all while those doing really well are deriving all the benefit. This is poor economics, morally bankrupt, and jeopardizing our democracy. The problem is not that people are out of work — unemployment is low — but that they are working harder than ever, and it's not enough to provide for themselves or their families. Economic anxiety, coupled with a social media environment in which fear, anger and conspiratorial thinking spread with virality is a toxic brew. And unless either party addresses the structural problems in our economy, we may be entering a period in which it is easier to gain the presidency than it is to keep it.
I am confident that we can meet this challenge, and that if we direct ourselves to it with urgency and determination, the Democratic Party can have a resurgence in the midterms. But we must advocate a bold and clear vision for how we can make the economy work for everyone, and reestablish ourselves as the champion of hard-working Americans, something we have always been and continue to be. We must also figure out how to overcome a media environment in which conservatives dominate the field — _Fox_ , conservative radio, right-wing podcasts, and more. In the meantime, we must be prepared for rough seas ahead, particularly in the near term, as a wannabe authoritarian tests the limits of his authority with a pliant majority in Congress.
Notwithstanding all of the challenges we face, I am looking forward to serving in the Senate. The Senate has a different culture than the House and remains a place where you can find willing colleagues across the aisle and get things done. In that sense, it is a very entrepreneurial environment, and I am already seeking out Republican partners who are interested in reducing the cost of housing, expanding quality childcare, helping rural hospitals, and more. My priority is to look for areas where we can get things done — we don’t have the luxury of waiting four years for that — and pick my battles with the Administration when it is necessary to defend the rights, values, and freedoms of the American people, rather than chase every crazy squirrel that comes out of Trump world.
I am so grateful for the confidence you have shown in me, and the support you gave me during this challenging Senate campaign. I am determined to remain at my post, find ways to work across the aisle, and get things done for my state and country.
Best,
Adam
135 E. Olive Ave., #750 Burbank CA, 91502
**[www.adamschiff.com](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/60?t=1&akid=8195%2E5257348%2ESon3tx) | [contact@adamschiff.com](mailto:contact@adamschiff.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/64?t=2&akid=8195%2E5257348%2ESon3tx)**
PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE

Text **JOIN** to **724433**. If you wish to no longer receive these messages, please [unsubscribe.](https://act.adamschiff.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=8195%2E5257348%2ESon3tx)

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: Officially APPEALED
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
I will continue to fight this injustice.

[https://secure.winred.com/rudy-giuliani-freedom-fund-79a3adfa/a3323b0d2e57dabb/?utm_campaign=20241127&utm_medium=email&utm_source=RW_B&utm_content=WAMA&utm_term=vbout]

Dear Friend,

The Democrat Deep State wants $146 MILLION from me – all because I
dared to ask questions about the legitimacy of America’s elections.

To comply with such a frivolous demand, I’d have to give up
_EVERYTHING_ I own – including my dignity.

That’s why I have OFFICIALLY APPEALED this outrageous ruling that
would leave me on the streets.

As I stand on the brink of losing everything, I remind myself that the
Bible says that earthly possessions will always fade, but greater
“heavenly treasures” await us.

Truth, justice, and the fight for freedom are worth _infinitely_
more... They are the “heavenly treasures... that cannot be stolen
and will never rust, decay or lose their value.”

AND WHEN I SEE THAT TWO OF THE RIGGED CASES BROUGHT AGAINST PRESIDENT
TRUMP HAVE NOW BEEN DISMISSED AND “DELAYED INDEFINITELY,” I HAVE
HOPE THAT I CAN WIN MINE TOO!

_But my ability to win this appeal and stay in this fight until
justice is served depends entirely on the support given to me by kind
souls like you, Friend._

Let me also say that I know we’re in the midst of the holidays, so
family and friends come first. Please don’t feel pressured to give
if you can’t!

name: Research Survey [Voter Action Project]
subject: Supporter poll: Term limits for the Supreme Court?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project Logo [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=112724_1&amount=25]
BCJ: Why Term Limits for Supreme Court Justices Make Sense [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA007/1/89215/images/BrennanCenter_SCOTUS_TermLimits.png]
Judicial historians and other nonpartisan justice activists are restarting their campaigns for term limits on Supreme Court justices in the wake of the presidential election. They argue that lifetime appointments are misplaced in the common era and that a rotation of federal justices off the Supreme Court and back to the Court of Appeals would bring a larger sense of fairness to the proceedings in front of our highest court.
We want to hear from voters in your area to get their feelings on the topic. Will you take our one-question poll right away?
Team: Should Supreme Court justices be term-limited?
By clicking a response below your answer will be automatically recorded:
YES [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-pollresponse?refcode=112724_1&amount=15] NO [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-pollresponse?refcode=112724_1&amount=15]

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=112724_1&amount=25]
Donate Now [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=112724_1&amount=25]

I recently sent you a voter priority survey to gauge what mattered to voters in the 2024 election — **and I’m still waiting on your response.**

Hearing what matters most to you – the voters – is one of the _most important parts_ of my job. SUBJECT: Where we go from here
Peter, it’s Ritchie.

I’ve said it before: **The outcome of an election can easily become a Rorschach test on which we project our own ideological priors.** In order to avoid substituting narrative for truth, _we must go where the evidence takes us._

That’s why I want to hear from you, the voters, about what your biggest priorities were in this election, and what you want to see more of going forward:

www.torres.nyc

Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in.

name: Jared Golden
subject: Our race is headed to a recount
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
Help us make sure every vote is counted.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84401?refcode=em20241127-8683&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8683%2E614464%2Ebaqe1C)
Hi Peter, it’s Jared Golden.
I’m writing with an important update on my race... After all the votes have been counted and the ranked choice voting tabulation is now complete, I remain in the lead in Maine’s second district by 2,706 votes, of nearly 403,000 votes cast.
**However, my opponent has filed for a recount, which is within his right to do. This is expected to take place over the next couple of weeks.**
**[I need your help to make sure every vote is counted! So will you split a donation between me and Lucas Kunce to help us prepare for a recount?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84401?refcode=em20241127-8683&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=8683%2E614464%2Ebaqe1C)**
Thank you,
Jared

Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.lucaskunce.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=8683%2E614464%2Ebaqe1C). Mail us: PO BOX 1240 Independence, MO 64050.

Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

| We weren’t planning on emailing again, but we just got a huge update: **For the first time, Democrat Adam Gray has just taken the lead in tossup district CA-13.** If Adam Gray holds this lead, it will be another critical California U.S. House that we’ve flipped from red to blue. And that means that Speaker Mike Johnson will have an *unbearably* small Republican Majority. **[Adam Gray is in the lead now, in no small part, because we’ve been working to ensure every eligible vote is counted in this district. name: Hillsdale College via Trump News HQ
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.

This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z51uc25qhdjslqbm6crajk63vnbaojat29g332f0_rp22sh2s8i6epj2ctge1o34c9h2bs) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course called **“The Second World Wars.”**
**Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson** , this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zoip5fin5s9943s0qcubu3agm0l4uc4fgur76il8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2ctge1o34c9h2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of **“The Second World Wars”** on DVD:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z57gh4d0e5d4qa18gb2v75sdp7jst1p6fa9pf2c8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2ctge1o34c9h2bs)**
Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!
Best regards,
Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
P.S. The **“The Second World Wars”** DVD set is great as a homeschool curriculum or for independent study. Plus, it makes a perfect gift for anyone who wants to know more about the Second World War. **[Reserve your copy now.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zrm1ilk0e2a8k52gv8ufr32oo7en39t6qk4r22i0_rp22sh2s8i6epj2ctge1o34c9h2bs)**

name: Anna Paulina Luna
subject: I’m thankful for you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANNA PAULINA LUNA FOR CONGRESS
body:
You’ve done so much for the MAGA Movement.

| | | | [](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z5vs0ev8mn2om8uq55fmuij5fs8j39a6pphfncq0_rp22sh2s8i6epj2ctge1o34c5h2bs)

|
---
As I gather with those I love on Thanksgiving, I sit here and reflect on some of the things I am most thankful for this year.

I am thankful for President Trump - along with his vision for this country, and his resounding America-First message.

I am thankful for the friends and loved ones that have supported me and battled with me through it all.

But, this message isn’t for them - it’s for you.

I truly couldn’t do this without you, John.
You’ve been absolutely _**PIVOTAL**_ to the MAGA Movement, and for that, I could never thank you enough.

But, as we all know - the new generation of Deep State Democrats will _**NOT**_ take a Holiday. While we won _**BIG**_ just a few weeks ago - the fight to defend this country continues, and we’re still in the fight of our lives.

Democrats this very moment are pouring _**MILLIONS**_ of dollars back into campaigns that allow men in girls’ locker rooms, unlimited illegal immigration, and the transitioning of children.

_**[If you’d like to help us fight back today by donating today -](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z8pf1h4h0r1tl3jo6gnep08oibvrasm213tdo65g_rp22sh2s8i6epj2ctge1o34c5h2bs)**_

I’d be thankful.

Thanks for all you do, and thanks for all you continue to do.

\- Anna Paulina Luna

name: Hillsdale College via Updates For Great Americans
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.

This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z9v7uj2jume66kh40lpcuu9qk588iah9ckvsquc8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2ctge1p70c5h2bs) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course called **“The Second World Wars.”**
**Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson** , this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zu6c4qg3uitd85cd73g0idc5ujm7qo0cc0ofh4vo_rp22sh2s8i6epj2ctge1p70c5h2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of **“The Second World Wars”** on DVD:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z2b0pgbgm6kneipjlutq2jpggubdcmabug3m09bo_rp22sh2s8i6epj2ctge1p70c5h2bs)**
Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!
Best regards,
Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
P.S. The **“The Second World Wars”** DVD set is great as a homeschool curriculum or for independent study. Plus, it makes a perfect gift for anyone who wants to know more about the Second World War. **[Reserve your copy now.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zg5qknoe3dbbotds9ua6rpfbv7vejo83529nknfg_rp22sh2s8i6epj2ctge1p70c5h2bs)**
---

name: Hillsdale College via ICYMI News
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.

This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z031kmk6b2kukh8r7gl8bscspa8267nboifbd590_rp22sh2s8i6epj2ctie8or2cth2bs) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course called **“The Second World Wars.”**
**Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson** , this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zb0b6pcdrftitjcmlvuul0aofvh9oil8fhectevo_rp22sh2s8i6epj2ctie8or2cth2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of **“The Second World Wars”** on DVD:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z56t6nla2lg4bgjdr426poqqggvgko31sa206qtg_rp22sh2s8i6epj2ctie8or2cth2bs)**
Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!
Best regards,
Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
P.S. The **“The Second World Wars”** DVD set is great as a homeschool curriculum or for independent study. Plus, it makes a perfect gift for anyone who wants to know more about the Second World War. **[Reserve your copy now.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z14lt5ndh3o2dhl0t177gro2npunt3p6fll0lep8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2ctie8or2cth2bs)**

body:

❌ The Establishment tried to **SILENCE** him ❌

❌ The Fake News Media tried to **SMEAR** him ❌

# **[WaPo smears Trump by connecting him to alleged hate crimes despite no evidence](http://trk.libertyledger.-eDwA95HQ)**
---
Incoming White House press secretary Karoline Leavitt revealed on X that the Washington Post is attempting to link President-elect Donald Trump's victory to a series of alleged hate crimes that took place after November 5, despite not having evidence that they are connected to Trump."I just received one of the most absurd emails EVER from the Washington Post," Leavitt said. "This 'reporter' is doing gymnastics to try and sow division and blame President Trump for something that he admits in his email has no trace to him whatsoever. This is exactly why NOBODY trusts the Fake News Media." "Jeff Bezos warned his staff before the election, and they’re still not listening to him!" she added.

name: Michael Baumgartner
subject: Happy Thanksgiving & DC Orientation Update.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vote Baumgartner for Congress | (509) 370-8398 | www
body:
So much to be thankful for! | | | | | |
---
|
---
| | | | | Dear Friends,
I hope this note finds you surrounded by loved ones as we celebrate one of my favorite holidays. A few days ago I returned home to Spokane from my two week Congressional freshman orientation in DC and I, indeed, have much to be thankful for.
I’m looking forward to joining Eleanor and the kids for the annual local “Turkey Trot” and then heading to my parents in Pullman this weekend to join the extended family watching the Cougs play football against Wyoming.
Read below for some more fun notes from my orientation in DC and if you get a moment, please drop me a line and let me know how you and your family are celebrating Thanksgiving.
Best, Michael

---
|
# “Winning” the office lottery
---
| Each new Congress all the Freshman members participate in an “office selection lottery” to determine the order in which they get to choose their offices. No one takes it too seriously, but it is a lot of fun and heavily covered by the DC press corps.
Much to my good luck, I drew the “second overall pick” out of the 60 new Freshman members of Congress. After taking a moment to celebrate by striking a TD celebration pose with my classmates I ended up with a newly remodeled office on the first floor of the Cannon Building across from the Capitol.
You can read coverage of the proceedings in this [article](https://hotmail.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=91b93e6889137ccb3f3fef037&id=ef5d270ee3&e=5a45b9550e) from Roll Call.
---
| **First Congressional Photo**
---
| Freshman orientation concluded with sitting for our first Congressional portrait photo that Members-elect will use until we are officially sworn in on January 3rd and receive our Congressional lapel pins.
---
|
# A nice moment with Cathy
---
| It was really wonderful to share a special moment with Congresswoman Cathy McMorris Rodgers on the floor of the Chamber after a vote and then walk outside down the steps of Congress together.
She leaves such a fantastic legacy of service for Eastern Washington and it was fun to see that her fellow members of Congress all appreciate her as much as we do.
---
|
---
| Paid for by Vote Baumgartner for Congress | (509) 370-8398 | www.votebaumgartner.com

Our mailing address is: Vote Baumgartner for Congress, PO Box 8508, Spokane, WA 99203

name: Hillsdale College via American Action News
subject: Before they're gone
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2znt49t8evcbt16qken4g6cm6tod66t5alg5t9nno_rp22sh2s8i6epj2ctieeo34cjh2bs) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course called **“The Second World Wars.”**
**Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson** , this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2znpm56eaamofi3c4v1jra9kiq980ujgqve3at200_rp22sh2s8i6epj2ctieeo34cjh2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of **“The Second World Wars”** on DVD:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z35kkfo9eefs9fmf9np69oria6cdf5n5knus7bto_rp22sh2s8i6epj2ctieeo34cjh2bs)**
Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!
Best regards,
Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
P.S. The **“The Second World Wars”** DVD set is great as a homeschool curriculum or for independent study. Plus, it makes a perfect gift for anyone who wants to know more about the Second World War. **[Reserve your copy now.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5nv7konth652jul1b20qmhahl5fkjglh2i60qeo_rp22sh2s8i6epj2ctieeo34cjh2bs)**

name: TPUSA Faith
subject: Grateful Hearts, Blessed Thanksgiving
body:
May the Lord continue to pour out His blessings on you and your loved ones this Thanksgiving season. May His peace, love, and joy fill your heart and home, and may you always find reasons to give thanks, in every season of life.
|
---
Dear Peter, As we gather to celebrate this season of Thanksgiving, we want to take a moment to express a heartfelt gratitude for you. In the midst of many challenges as the body of Christ, this past year has reminded us what to be grateful for. We stood firm and bold in the face of adversity and as a result, God has and will continue to get all of the glory. The Lord has been faithful, and in His goodness, He continues to surround us with love and grace. We are reminded of the scripture in 1 Thessalonians 5:18 which says, “In everything give thanks; for this is the will of God in Christ Jesus concerning you.” It’s a beautiful reminder that our lives, though full of ups and downs, are ultimately woven together with His perfect plan.
---
---
Thank you for being part of this journey. Whether through prayers, partnership, or the simple gift of community, you have been a blessing in more ways than words can convey. Our heart is full of gratitude for you. May the Lord continue to pour out His blessings on you and your loved ones this Thanksgiving season. May His peace, love, and joy fill your heart and home, and may you always find reasons to give thanks, in every season of life. Wishing you and your loved ones a Thanksgiving filled with God’s grace and an abundance of blessings. With a grateful heart, TPUSA Faith

clean_body: May the Lord continue to pour out His blessings on you and your loved ones this Thanksgiving season. May His peace, love, and joy fill your heart and home, and may you always find reasons to give thanks, in every season of life. | Dear Peter, As we gather to celebrate this season of Thanksgiving, we want to take a moment to express a heartfelt gratitude for you. In the midst of many challenges as the body of Christ, this past year has reminded us what to be grateful for. We stood firm and bold in the face of adversity and as a result, God has and will continue to get all of the glory. The Lord has been faithful, and in His goodness, He continues to surround us with love and grace. We are reminded of the scripture in 1 Thessalonians 5:18 which says, “In everything give thanks; for this is the will of God in Christ Jesus concerning you.” It’s a beautiful reminder that our lives, though full of ups and downs, are ultimately woven together with His perfect plan. Thank you for being part of this journey. Whether through prayers, partnership, or the simple gift of community, you have been a blessing in more ways than words can convey. Our heart is full of gratitude for you. May the Lord continue to pour out His blessings on you and your loved ones this Thanksgiving season. May His peace, love, and joy fill your heart and home, and may you always find reasons to give thanks, in every season of life. Wishing you and your loved ones a Thanksgiving filled with God’s grace and an abundance of blessings. With a grateful heart, TPUSA Faith | Turning Point USA, 4940 East Beverly Road, Phoenix, AZ 85044, United States of America, (844) 872-1776

name: Hillsdale College via Restore Our Nation
subject: Before they're gone
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.

This sponsored message from Restore Our Nation is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Nd7gZlA_FWPkD2TvSUA-IQ~~/AARclAA~~~) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course called **“The Second World Wars.”**
**Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson** , this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Nd7gZlA_FWPkD2TvSUA-IQ~~/AARclAA~~~) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of **“The Second World Wars”** on DVD:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Nd7gZlA_FWPkD2TvSUA-IQ~~/AARclAA~~~)**
Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!
Best regards,
Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
P.S. The **“The Second World Wars”** DVD set is great as a homeschool curriculum or for independent study. Plus, it makes a perfect gift for anyone who wants to know more about the Second World War. **[Reserve your copy now.](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Nd7gZlA_FWPkD2TvSUA-IQ~~/AARclAA~~~)**
---

Restore Our Nation
---

subject: Happy Thanksgiving!
body: ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ https://click.updates.marshablackburn.com/?qs=a84d1d99cb26a08d8e9b6dd4e30803fe50c606caa30015784becd8ac55540189f484f6afd60ae6711823f392211e9df34966946a6c57b81c3bc8a4a5880c8cd4 Peter, I wanted to take a moment today to reach out and wish you a Happy Thanksgiving. Thanksgiving is a time to be with loved ones and a time to reflect on the many blessings in our lives. This Thanksgiving, I’m so thankful for my family and my country, and I’m especially grateful for supporters like YOU. Without your constant support, I wouldn’t be where I am today: leading Tennessee through President Trump’s America First vision. Peter, you make it ALL possible, and I am so grateful. I could never say thank you enough for your constant support, prayers, and dedication. As we head into the holiday season, I’m also reflecting on how fortunate we are to live in the greatest country on Earth. As we gather today with our friends and family to give thanks, we must also take a moment to think of the brave men and women serving our country who are unable to be home this holiday season. It’s because of them that we have the blessing to live free in this great nation and celebrate with our loved ones. >From my family to yours, I hope that you have a very Happy Thanksgiving! God bless you & God bless America, Marsha Blackburn Paid for by Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Marsha for Senate, MARSHA PAC, and Tennessee Republican Party Federal Election Account. Thanksgiving is a time to be with loved ones and a time to reflect on the many blessings in our lives. This Thanksgiving, I’m so thankful for my family and my country, and I’m especially grateful for supporters like YOU. Without your constant support, I wouldn’t be where I am today: leading Tennessee through President Trump’s America First vision. Peter, you make it ALL possible, and I am so grateful. name: Kelly Loeffler
subject: Happy Thanksgiving!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greater Georgia Action, Inc
body:
a note from Kelly
| | | | | [](https://fsdy8nbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001bSS2guR0851ayOORBe4WkadM56tqXJKeCPLktKZNrFMdJZ-pN38bm4wnnF8uMeeQbkMXJtR7-8usZCa4plOG28cx_Y0G3TpnlWCSMxpQjpxI_5TEQ_G7CXZkSojs_EIJ2lmgDDnrZF-VlHlBqV2qaL6MuaVezI5o&c=oluT4rs7jrW-ISuvMD1kdtA5ZpA4GmLyAN80nsx3mLd3NbwNSxJvsg==&ch=qQrdiL72iF26aiIdnoe3SqKU-O7Q1NTeQ5dpo8rUeB6gHBnuDyhZJA==)
---
| Dear Friends,
I want to wish you and your families a wonderful Thanksgiving as we join with loved ones and offer thanks to God for his endless blessings.
I also want to extend my overwhelming gratitude for your dedicated support of our work at Greater Georgia, especially after an election cycle that saw historic victories for our movement.
Now in our fourth year, Greater Georgia is the state's leading conservative voter mobilization group. We have registered over 55,000 voters and made millions of voter contacts - including more than 14 million this year alone. Our year-round approach to voter registration, diverse community outreach, and election advocacy has helped deliver a new and winning conservative coalition. And in about 50 days, we will send President Trump back to the White House along with strong leaders at the federal, state, and local levels.
Our success would not have been possible without you, and I am so grateful for your support of our mission to grow Georgia's conservative movement. Whether you joined us at our events and voter registration drives, made phone calls to get out the vote, hosted us for a community roundtable, or helped us advocate for important issues like election integrity, education, and public safety - you helped build the infrastructure that successfully protected Georgia's strong legacy of conservative leadership.
As always, there is more work to do. The fight for Georgia's future continues, and it will require our sustained dedication in the new year. But our grassroots army has never been more energized, and our resolve has never been stronger. Together, and with more hard work, I believe we can continue this historic momentum to keep Georgia red for generations.
We are blessed to live in the greatest nation on earth with the freedoms that many could never imagine or enjoy. We can never give up the fight to protect those freedoms for our children and grandchildren. I look forward to working side by side with you to defend our values and Georgia's future.
Thank you once again for your time, energy, and friendship. May God bless you and your family, and I hope you have a wonderful Thanksgiving!
Give thanks in all circumstances; for this is God's will for you in Christ Jesus! 1 Thessalonians 5:18
Warm regards,
---
| |
---
| Kelly Loeffler Greater Georgia Chairwoman
---
| |
---

body:
Here’s why:

| | | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2e416852e21449809cb6d0ce61ba77f6&_e=0Wl8doE_uk8u4zOGm4mlLkJRJt6bu2rRx7UfOoXGjjk32oDz-8mrcsey83TeudtdeozRThT4CtYUBlvqBk6SDy5YtOK6lOkfOdr3xVFKvE8r8hI_lfrkAqZqWKHi_LWbVJ59bC4lbxjP5VwCQpz3dd-29FIrcn5ZuTmhAqkgIf0foA0XYv0epiK-ztK_5kb1bKYMo8kFYkwyn8r0iw2rbs829HcV-URDUHl1NUUPqrceNW0xw6ku5cjmP9QyfzN0i2y3harsvZNMOzfx_3zrM3v5F5mK8QYYV30PK7U_mAAmzEEcMsckdAYSPIzwpantMgfspM9XGR0d_4iObZHJlrmDQBOA30Fm-kMTI0TPO1xzI5MNgRg2yQJzH8_jmaar_UKvWdnXoYuzOiD4O92ve_wThPriZ6CxLpwFRoGGPR59uP0L1uV_fU3D4LOP1gHqeBvDRIHtKy89mbkTkgzm0BeVUQu-JWFmKValerNpjl8%3D)

In 2022, I sent Liz Cheney packing.

She turned her back on the Republican Party, President Trump, and most importantly, the AMERICAN PEOPLE.

So, on Election Day that year, I took her office.

_**This is Congresswoman Harriet Hageman.**_

For years, I’ve stood by President Trump - and the MAGA movement showed up for him this November with the greatest victory in American History!
We’ve got a REPUBLICAN HOUSE, SENATE, AND WHITE HOUSE, **all thanks to Patriots like YOU!**
America is one step closer to returning to the powerhouse it once was. Already, we’re seeing promises being kept, and a future that’s hopeful for us, our children, and our grandchildren.
This Holiday season, I wanted to show my appreciation for YOU.
Without you by our side, we couldn’t have pulled off the Greatest Comeback in American History. If you would like to donate to show your support,**[I’m including a link here.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2e416852e21449809cb6d0ce61ba77f6&_e=0Wl8doE_uk8u4zOGm4mlLkJRJt6bu2rRx7UfOoXGjjk32oDz-8mrcsey83TeudtdeozRThT4CtYUBlvqBk6SDy5YtOK6lOkfOdr3xVFKvE8r8hI_lfrkAqZqWKHi_LWbVJ59bC4lbxjP5VwCQpz3dd-29FIrcn5ZuTmhAqkgIf0foA0XYv0epiK-ztK_5kb1bKYMo8kFYkwyn8r0iw2rbs829HcV-URDUHl1NUUPqrceNW0xw6ku5cjmP9QyfzN0i2y3harsvZNMOzfx_3zrM3v5F5mK8QYYV30PK7U_mAAmzEEcMsckdAYSPIzwpantIIau_Uqj8Xw6e5NpLEqhbCs1vGKWx1MHjBBvGQjLN9Tq_OLv-b4Miaxuc9MN2z2Lj0lS_CQKLgDNEH7haMrXv8-OAeYtiCrFceIuH7TC2l8W93fCbTteb0wPE2HLORZ_fh2RKjUPpQ1UDIvfLSkLZfVw5KR37a734QmNGCk5Whw%3D)**
If you're struggling to make ends meet right now, please disregard this and go about your day.

Rest assured, I will keep fighting tooth and nail against the Democrats in D.C. to put an end to the Biden-Harris inflation that’s hurting hard working Americans like you.

Together, we will make America Strong, Safe, and Healthy Again. The Best is Yet to Come!
Thank you & God Bless.
Congresswoman Harriet Hageman

clean_body: Here’s why: | | | | In 2022, I sent Liz Cheney packing. She turned her back on the Republican Party, President Trump, and most importantly, the AMERICAN PEOPLE. So, on Election Day that year, I took her office. This is Congresswoman Harriet Hageman. For years, I’ve stood by President Trump - and the MAGA movement showed up for him this November with the greatest victory in American History! We’ve got a REPUBLICAN HOUSE, SENATE, AND WHITE HOUSE, all thanks to Patriots like YOU! America is one step closer to returning to the powerhouse it once was. Already, we’re seeing promises being kept, and a future that’s hopeful for us, our children, and our grandchildren. This Holiday season, I wanted to show my appreciation for YOU. Without you by our side, we couldn’t have pulled off the Greatest Comeback in American History. If you would like to donate to show your support, If you're struggling to make ends meet right now, please disregard this and go about your day. Rest assured, I will keep fighting tooth and nail against the Democrats in D.C. to put an end to the Biden-Harris inflation that’s hurting hard working Americans like you. Together, we will make America Strong, Safe, and Healthy Again. The Best is Yet to Come! Thank you & God Bless. Congresswoman Harriet Hageman | | | | PAID FOR BY HAGEMAN FOR WYOMING | Defend the Constitution PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Hillsdale College via Conservatives Give
subject: Before they're gone
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.

This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=99944432e7434e0b9dcedf3a7be6b997&_e=jnMg0thWv1K7omIRcCgT_IIoVsKgtjlSvvVBohZMWs_cc727y07n__FumVwmqvjPk-oHNHdPYIFRf0--BdrfVy8VBvZW4kOKjShUn4u4bCuhv8_s2SAPIfQGF9DAZTtLKsdqskZBztq7UgKew04rb6_36OiXtLVTA7pE3-yG67Cu7Oo3rjLKUzxOHHPJz8rzA4zfE4dhm81Z_D2QIavZ9wP_xjiG3iKkENqy4cQJfEdLndst8d7zPs3_QUFP-7EzVrNjfA7HiwWDXSn8VGmGzvUBXSYTa2b0jq03peIRfIHtGTKNTl5y-_sEZJMJywWudrHugjErAwBmciXCdj9P1RoHNKDY6lz4Km8RUVM8JxSoX7lrxaCBC2NPoaYfIIpnNcx7HY6wBa2rgJPZ9DM_cmAirSmCF-4-oIap9HuSUSmln8qd-IpT6k_RFjZAYkMV) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course called **“The Second World Wars.”**
**Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson** , this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. clean_body: Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course called “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson , this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “The Second World Wars” on DVD: Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College P.S. The “The Second World Wars” DVD set is great as a homeschool curriculum or for independent study. Plus, it makes a perfect gift for anyone who wants to know more about the Second World War. Conservatives Give PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

| | Fellow Conservative, From my family to yours, we wish you a Happy Thanksgiving.

I'm so incredibly thankful for my family; and for the work I am entrusted to do on behalf of Texans and the American people in the U.S. Senate; and for the fact that our great Nation rose up to end the insanity in Washington this election.

**And I 'm so thankful to have true patriots like YOU standing with me! **
---
[](http://trk.tedcruz.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM4NzQ5MDg0NSIsInJxIjoiMDItYjI0MzMzLWRkZjljODA5Y2YwMzQ0MGFiYWYwNmFkOTZjNjdhODBiIiwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMSIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vdGVkLWNydXovcGdfZV90aGFua3NnaXZpbmctZmc2XzIwMjQxMTI1X2Ffb3RoZXI_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1FLUhvdXNlRmlsZSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Q3J1el9UaGFua3NnaXZpbmdfMjAyNDExMjUmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1FbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1UaGFua3NnaXZpbmcmdXRtX2FnZW5jeT1QRyZhbW91bnQ9NzUmcmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUifQ/GLoX39Ev20o3rnLV3sXEzA)

Let's all count our blessings today, for the plentiful food we'll enjoy, for the fellowship we all need so much more of in our lives, and the fact that we rallied together this year and got the job done to Keep Texas, Texas.

_**God bless you, God bless the Lone Star State, and God bless America!**_

\- Ted

name: Harriet Hageman
subject: I’m thankful for You
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HAGEMAN FOR WYOMING**
body:
Here’s why:

| | | | [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/_WL1OhRLE_zhvvD6tdBZIg~~/AARclAA~~)
---
In 2022, I sent Liz Cheney packing.

She turned her back on the Republican Party, President Trump, and most importantly, the AMERICAN PEOPLE.

So, on Election Day that year, I took her office.

_**This is Congresswoman Harriet Hageman.**_

For years, I’ve stood by President Trump - and the MAGA movement showed up for him this November with the greatest victory in American History!
We’ve got a REPUBLICAN HOUSE, SENATE, AND WHITE HOUSE, **all thanks to Patriots like YOU!**
America is one step closer to returning to the powerhouse it once was. Already, we’re seeing promises being kept, and a future that’s hopeful for us, our children, and our grandchildren.
This Holiday season, I wanted to show my appreciation for YOU.
Without you by our side, we couldn’t have pulled off the Greatest Comeback in American History. If you would like to donate to show your support,**[I’m including a link here.](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/_WL1OhRLE_zhvvD6tdBZIg~~/AARclAA~~)**
If you're struggling to make ends meet right now, please disregard this and go about your day.

Rest assured, I will keep fighting tooth and nail against the Democrats in D.C. to put an end to the Biden-Harris inflation that’s hurting hard working Americans like you.

Together, we will make America Strong, Safe, and Healthy Again. The Best is Yet to Come!
Thank you & God Bless.
Congresswoman Harriet Hageman

name: Hillsdale College via Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: Before they're gone
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.

This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=5c05210786314118a65e442c9647ca19&_e=wCoSA3xef6ajESji9-ByhjXhAD829AsuV7rKVUP1lcGhIaSEfWjhGLIekc_MIFW8KaSEM8TsJr3MCrgnaVpkIKIoqINiJp2mHM5ol5UKs1mhvX-NHwspU8xfvfH1UANrafLSLIrvtdWProdUpSw_E62CRqEuIvkIMOOmtyhHDWG8GALURTIGMussUaqj-Rb2RK5FD1v7HjJqIc49VFUerQ1Mx5oiDdrDMuVgOT_g1lqKgQu4FdPewOmxHfpCV_Qw6WHTbDNudL3Zu7zPhf96VK-0pmZ_DJUF5j2ZaYAr3PvzOEPZQo2IkKKvHn_01r-AHoYtiG0gUa5qI7wjSOFA6p_FBmljZxcz13cl_7XX-Z_dRXBDnhSgYsHvyONqe_4wfFMJXRl2xwTgfuOGuKELAYw79cIQiqFNJBe6Pe3PsTKrRCUJmWoVlyYlVkvJJWIY) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we're losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course called **" The Second World Wars."**
**Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson** , this course explores how the conflict's diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=5c05210786314118a65e442c9647ca19&_e=wCoSA3xef6ajESji9-ByhjXhAD829AsuV7rKVUP1lcGhIaSEfWjhGLIekc_MIFW8KaSEM8TsJr3MCrgnaVpkIKIoqINiJp2mHM5ol5UKs1mhvX-NHwspU8xfvfH1UANrafLSLIrvtdWProdUpSw_E62CRqEuIvkIMOOmtyhHDWG8GALURTIGMussUaqj-Rb2RK5FD1v7HjJqIc49VFUerQ1Mx5oiDdrDMuVgOT_g1lqKgQu4FdPewOmxHfpCV_Qw6WHTbDNudL3Zu7zPhf96VBetG4ex9ZVpbVLZfgu5h5zKWnPvgAaSMim9S1fzcPZHn9SphYwtyQIopkr5mb6qRd6Y-VjDY1-t-PyyCXfYBDK44ZaOLcfdE-xLyJhGZH57jvp60rv0RdUhPAiJ_CxMgViXYGIr2iwrksTqQ4ZYWDzfPqUVP9U0Rnkacb__uCvM) If you'd like to secure a DVD set before they're all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
Here's a secure link to reserve your copy of **" The Second World Wars"** on DVD:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=5c05210786314118a65e442c9647ca19&_e=wCoSA3xef6ajESji9-ByhjXhAD829AsuV7rKVUP1lcGhIaSEfWjhGLIekc_MIFW8KaSEM8TsJr3MCrgnaVpkIKIoqINiJp2mHM5ol5UKs1mhvX-NHwspU8xfvfH1UANrafLSLIrvtdWProdUpSw_E62CRqEuIvkIMOOmtyhHDWG8GALURTIGMussUaqj-Rb2RK5FD1v7HjJqIc49VFUerQ1Mx5oiDdrDMuVgOT_g1lqKgQu4FdPewOmxHfpCV_Qw6WHTbDNudL3Zu7zPhf96VCl28StXJ7P7Cty7v5i_t1NpT7hnO5eesWRgmrsu5ePKhMYQ87xJ8jBQvnf7j-If_beiQMFoBHg6zH0JWrQFU3ZdtOrPP3TmR0R6QpN0UR22chHZoQVhjASXgTpTvojVdey0BlwQwItSVyRtspfg3jL8LsOkXBgaVZZDawQE_zAN)**
Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!
Best regards,
Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
P.S. The **" The Second World Wars"** DVD set is great as a homeschool curriculum or for independent study. Plus, it makes a perfect gift for anyone who wants to know more about the Second World War. **[Reserve your copy now.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=5c05210786314118a65e442c9647ca19&_e=wCoSA3xef6ajESji9-ByhjXhAD829AsuV7rKVUP1lcGhIaSEfWjhGLIekc_MIFW8KaSEM8TsJr3MCrgnaVpkIKIoqINiJp2mHM5ol5UKs1mhvX-NHwspU8xfvfH1UANrafLSLIrvtdWProdUpSw_E62CRqEuIvkIMOOmtyhHDWG8GALURTIGMussUaqj-Rb2RK5FD1v7HjJqIc49VFUerQ1Mx5oiDdrDMuVgOT_g1lqKgQu4FdPewOmxHfpCV_Qw6WHTbDNudL3Zu7zPhf96VDL-T4dk4go0ljG0x_5-JjdoYZMeQzE4Zqk0bFlc3Dm1Bc1cu5cPeE1MeU-TkQ97qxc0n-vew2nHgHZBJ9fR0M9gCUtila_uREYjWcJrSLx435zsQFQka7zu04W912zxFXgBBXpL8_a1ZWJjjt_3GUgAThkMXQ0JASeFk9EXPj6o)**

name: Troy Downing
subject: Happy Thanksgiving!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
| | | Happy Thanksgiving, Peter!

As we come together with family and friends this Thanksgiving, I want to take a moment to share my gratitude – for your support and for trusting me to serve as your next Congressman.
---
| | [](https://trk.emails.troydowning.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6NDg4MjgxNTEsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMjg5OS1kcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJxIjoiMDItYjI0MzMzLWQ5OWY1MDg1YjIxNzRkOTJiMGJmMmIyYzg0ODRkZmRjIiwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMCIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vd3d3LnRyb3lkb3duaW5nLmNvbS8_ZXhfdGlkPTIwMjQxMTI4X05ELVlELjExMDExN190MTU4MzA0OS0yODk5JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI0MTEyOF9ORC1ZRC4xMTAxMTdfdDE1ODMwNDktMjg5OSJ9/mRAHifqbQrnVIgnX3Gvkvg)
---
| | Thanksgiving is a time to reflect on the blessings in our lives, and at the top of my list are dedicated supporters like you, Peter. Representing you in Congress is a true honor, and I’m committed to working tirelessly to deliver the meaningful change you and your family deserve.

Let’s also keep in our prayers the brave men and women in uniform who are spending this holiday away from their families to protect our country. Their sacrifices remind us of the freedoms we hold dear.

Wishing you and your loved ones a season filled with joy, love, and gratitude.

God Bless,
Troy Downing
---

In 2022, I sent Liz Cheney packing.

She turned her back on the Republican Party, President Trump, and most importantly, the AMERICAN PEOPLE.

So, on Election Day that year, I took her office.

_**This is Congresswoman Harriet Hageman.**_

For years, I’ve stood by President Trump - and the MAGA movement showed up for him this November with the greatest victory in American History!
We’ve got a REPUBLICAN HOUSE, SENATE, AND WHITE HOUSE, **all thanks to Patriots like YOU!**
America is one step closer to returning to the powerhouse it once was. Already, we’re seeing promises being kept, and a future that’s hopeful for us, our children, and our grandchildren.
This Holiday season, I wanted to show my appreciation for YOU.
Without you by our side, we couldn’t have pulled off the Greatest Comeback in American History. If you would like to donate to show your support,**[I’m including a link here.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=28529a7bc0434f49b95c758f000c5648&_e=j394Y2b3vVcw9sxYdS56aQ1cEiPaMo8IOoHqN-DvYgg1GvqN4IjjXtCfDjmO2Cz257QeY0ZVEwFy9-P2c1rBUKAPtin7GIECwuutxO_wNPI7XPfZEtjVNCbZz2cdXg_6ASdI0oNUt2HkCi6VS0GmpDFNy8m6Gb1bdpVK1iBn-9bN3eQe0xz4YiOHlW-fTVLe4LhttkpXt1DX6fn9SiGOiQ1jcn72UAJVR39Cj8VebF-K0Ga28_AHoDVa3pxA7xOfnCqIqDWLdy9X5dMPFOiZ9pyYiYbaC6ZFT1GK0hZUbH5uebYPhLYDmpECdRMP1p1c9hwPZllBfaaOyC6wyWNowu1RmVuz3g3wgqEvLb0bDfOyyRoSVrkMD7KIgXEbD5bcaP_1aGfEAByouOzcM2UY1qImMkjpYdWqULonYz4wL_HzvJHHW-gyIKoeVB4__zTLLNZPSaTJhNdTUDm2MYCHRl3z4u-yI4qjgwy8Q2388Nw%3D)**
If you're struggling to make ends meet right now, please disregard this and go about your day.

Rest assured, I will keep fighting tooth and nail against the Democrats in D.C. to put an end to the Biden-Harris inflation that’s hurting hard working Americans like you.

Together, we will make America Strong, Safe, and Healthy Again. The Best is Yet to Come!
Thank you & God Bless.
Congresswoman Harriet Hageman

clean_body: Here’s why: | | | | In 2022, I sent Liz Cheney packing. She turned her back on the Republican Party, President Trump, and most importantly, the AMERICAN PEOPLE. So, on Election Day that year, I took her office. This is Congresswoman Harriet Hageman. For years, I’ve stood by President Trump - and the MAGA movement showed up for him this November with the greatest victory in American History! We’ve got a REPUBLICAN HOUSE, SENATE, AND WHITE HOUSE, all thanks to Patriots like YOU! America is one step closer to returning to the powerhouse it once was. Already, we’re seeing promises being kept, and a future that’s hopeful for us, our children, and our grandchildren. This Holiday season, I wanted to show my appreciation for YOU. Without you by our side, we couldn’t have pulled off the Greatest Comeback in American History. If you would like to donate to show your support, If you're struggling to make ends meet right now, please disregard this and go about your day. Rest assured, I will keep fighting tooth and nail against the Democrats in D.C. to put an end to the Biden-Harris inflation that’s hurting hard working Americans like you. Together, we will make America Strong, Safe, and Healthy Again. The Best is Yet to Come! Thank you & God Bless. Congresswoman Harriet Hageman | | | | PAID FOR BY HAGEMAN FOR WYOMING | Conservative Liberty Wire PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

subject: I’m thankful for You

body:
Here’s why:

| | | | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9ec9143811bd4f879e52f5a33922e2a6&_e=E37hdKoCOi37qsIFNjUEl4EFjxfLGK5MikOwm-2bdQCLPW4nHD9WWifHxQXFARZ8h8eMHmPsL6-aU3AyZ4mA0tsB_Ag6rfCapk8epGlQFvwTHL7PFCbz4diZYylCWFJSXZ9uKmjslTzv3AYhSktUZhQxBZA_7rjvZP0rRY65icyiAoe6q5I2hBEpx8-dy8oe7HRbvXhf7_eSKonMNI9wJZ_SrPkRNY3CKI03AwMkv47qWCQPoJL5Yyoo6uY13lhtgh_CjsWdXRPZ5gICCDTvaocbssAlmKqS4qoCcXPrOfmPEEUK4jGwiRPrGs7fRHnEblr8N0JLbV6jWp_KCK3zxEeMmfy42ZfByuOi2eZXbB_I8eP72osKoI-mkrzVjnVCFirghvUZv0Li5WkgV1Kw4B8Na7GtX3IoX-TQTnd5-ZBomLTxby-W1yRK5aipuYSCTkCHjS9FutXfN33pO-oITGJb3_QXYUUM-npSDE50sSU%3D)
---
In 2022, I sent Liz Cheney packing.

She turned her back on the Republican Party, President Trump, and most importantly, the AMERICAN PEOPLE.

So, on Election Day that year, I took her office.

_**This is Congresswoman Harriet Hageman.**_

For years, I’ve stood by President Trump - and the MAGA movement showed up for him this November with the greatest victory in American History!
We’ve got a REPUBLICAN HOUSE, SENATE, AND WHITE HOUSE, **all thanks to Patriots like YOU!**

body:
Peter, From my family to yours, Happy Thanksgiving! I hope you are able to take time today to slow down and reflect on the importance of family, community and everything we have to be grateful for. Psalm 118:1 says, “Oh give thanks to the Lord,
| | |

| | [](https://j0l1y7h.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fbrycereeves.com/1/010001937288ae31-17491b94-45d1-40a3-aa93-26cb1654b158-000000/D-OicKTESnd8X4kY5FKlHNJqZ0Y=402)
---
| Peter, From my family to yours, **_Happy Thanksgiving!_** I hope you are able to take time today to slow down and reflect on the importance of family, community and everything we have to be grateful for. Psalm 118:1 says, **_“Oh give thanks to the Lord, for He is good; for His steadfast love endures forever!”_****** Today as we remember all we have to be grateful for, let us not forget that “every good and perfect gift is from above" (James 1:17).
---
| | |
---
| The holiday season is now in full swing, which means the 2025 Legislative Session is fast-approaching. My office has been busy preparing for our annual journey to Richmond, working on legislation to ensure that Virginia remains (As Governor Youngkin says): **_the best place to LIVE, to WORK, and to RAISE A FAMILY!_**
---
| | |
---
| ** _Please feel free to reach out_** to my office if you have questions or comments about bills that arise during the legislative session, or if you just want to say, “hi!” During session, e-mail is by far my best method of contact. You're also always welcome to come visit me in person - **_My door is always open._ **Be sure to email my office to set an appointment so I know I'm able to sit down with you personally. Yours in service,
---
| | |
---
| Bryce E. ReevesSenator28th Senatorial District of VA(540) 645-8440
