It’s important that I remember that it truly is an incredibly rare and precious opportunity to run for office. But running for office is just one piece of the puzzle. Democracy is a delicate thing, and despite the results, I’m so proud that Georgians turned out to protect their rights and use their vote — it’s the only way we keep both. Remember that you have power. Not just with your vote, but with every action you take in your community. It’s up to us to use those moments to make our corner of the world better. And I’m thankful for the opportunity that gives me every day. Wishing you and your families a peaceful and bright Thanksgiving, — Rev. Darrius Butler = Raised by public servants and pastors, Rev. Darrius Butler is a minister and nonprofit leader dedicated to helping Georgians in need. Darrius knows that the families in his district deserve someone who gives a damn. If you believe you received this email in error or would no longer like to receive email updates from the campaign, please click here to ._** Paid for by: Rev Butler for Georgia 2024 FEC ID: C00857508 5437 Bowman Rd Ste 120 PMB 151 Macon, GA 31210

#
Peter –
After a busy year, I am truly grateful to be spending a quiet and relaxing Thanksgiving with my family.
I know you’re with the ones you love most, so I won't take too much of your time. I know there are turkey trots to be run, football games to watch (Go Bears!), and pumpkin pies to be baked – but I wanted to take a quick moment to express my gratitude for your support.
There is no doubt that a lot has happened during 2024. And we know there’s a lot of uncertainty with leadership changes in the White House and Congress.
But we have today to celebrate everything we are grateful for. I’m grateful to have my beautiful family, the job of a lifetime by being your Senator, and your willingness to support me and my colleagues through all the ups and downs.
No matter what comes next, we’ll always have each other to count on.
So from my family to yours, I hope you get to spend a lot of quality time with your loved ones and rest up before 2025 arrives. Have a happy Thanksgiving, everyone.
– Dick

* * *
Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97810642/514661380/2140832878?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZDBhYmM0Ny1hYWFkLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AtBq35-xrR6vgzqiuqV5VdNOfW9kmtdlVd37u-ClCcE=&emci=978789a9-e9ac-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=ed0abc47-aaad-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=9818364)
---

| | I’m eternally thankful for our grassroots movement of hard-working Oregonians who work day in and day out to create a better America. **This year, I am more thankful than ever for your support.** As our country enters a period of unknown, I’m inspired by all those who refuse to give in to those who seek to divide us, and those who continue stepping up to create positive change. It is because of you that I remain hopeful for future generations – and I know that our work together has never been more important. The values we stand for haven’t changed; our movement is still one that is dedicated to protecting the ideas of liberty and justice for all. So to all of you who have partnered with me in this work and remain dedicated to the work ahead, I thank you. Wishing you and yours a very Happy Thanksgiving. Onward, _Ron_ |
---|---|---

| | Paid for and authorized by Wyden for Senate.

For many Americans, today is Thanksgiving Day. A time to reflect on family, friendships, and what we are grateful for. For many Indigenous Peoples, today is not a day of celebration, but a day of mourning. In fact, it is recognized as The National Day of Mourning, and it is critical we understand why. **Let 's Address This.**
Let's Address This with Qasim Rashid is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..N29NxoSB3wDY9tm_iFBChsJXfsIaBBssFjGoozzkNuk?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=152268642)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/ea10e2ce-c31d-4a23-8064-06fde6ab52e5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The Dignity Statute in South Dakota, a 50 foot tall statute in honor of the Lakota and Dakota people. "_Dignity represents the courage, perseverance and wisdom of the Lakota and Dakota culture in South Dakota. My hope is that the sculpture might serve as a symbol of respect and promise for the future. " -- Dale Lamphere, Sculptor of The Dignity Statue_
## What Is The National Day of Mourning?
To get straight to the point, this plaque posted in the Town of Plymouth on behalf of the United American Indians of New England explains it with brevity and clarity.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e46f7989-d8eb-4aa8-9b98-878dd76e50dd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
European colonization ignited a mass genocide of Native Americans so severe, that notwithstanding the inconceivable human impact, it literally changed the climate. While scholars differ and the precise number of Native Americans killed, leading scholarship estimates that European colonizers mass murdered [at least 56 million Native Americans](https://substack.com/redirect/df29d3e2-6b69-4018-a7f7-5e25c47ada1c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in North, Central, and South America:
> When Europeans arrived in the Americas, they caused so much death and disease that it changed the global climate, a new study finds. [European settlers killed 56 million indigenous people](https://substack.com/redirect/848151af-0a17-4d93-bfc2-6858cd05273a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) over about 100 years in South, Central and North America, causing large swaths of farmland to be abandoned and reforested, researchers at University College London, or UCL, estimate. The increase in trees and vegetation across an area the size of France resulted in a massive decrease in carbon dioxide (CO2) in the atmosphere, according to the study. Carbon levels changed enough to cool the Earth by 1610, researchers found. [Columbus arrived in 1492](https://substack.com/redirect/ea9d9f35-7fcf-4a70-ab14-e692054d41f8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..N29NxoSB3wDY9tm_iFBChsJXfsIaBBssFjGoozzkNuk?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=152268642)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/3973c9ee-be29-4aa7-98d7-2105a272302e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Columbus's arrival, and certainly the subsequent mass European colonization and Trans-Atlantic Slave Trade that those colonizers enacted, was devastating to hundreds of millions of Native Americans. And while some defend Columbus to this day as some noble hero, his own writings show that his voyages were driven by a fascist desire to violently convert Indigenous people to Christianity, by any means necessary. In his journal, he describes his mission to spread Christianity and praises the expulsion of Jews and Muslims from Spain, demonstrating a fervent commitment to conquest and subjugation. Columbus wrote in his journal to King Ferdinand and Queen Isabella:
> Your Highnesses, as Catholic Christians and Princes who love the holy Christian faith, and the propagation of it, and who are enemies to the sect of Mahomet and to all idolatries and heresies, resolved to send me, Cristobal Colon, to the said parts of India to see the said princes...with a view that they might be converted to our holy faith...Thus, after having turned out all the Jews from all your kingdoms and lordships...your Highnesses gave orders to me that with a sufficient fleet I should go to the said parts of India...I shall forget sleep, and shall work at the business of navigation, so that the service is performed (Borne, 1906: 76).
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/5392dc4e-94ea-47b4-bc18-4f7918edaa4f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
And over the last 400 plus years, that genocide has continued in numerous other ways. Indigenous Americans suffer among the highest rates of infant mortality, maternal mortality, drug and alcohol abuse, and low life expectancy. This is not due to any other reason than the perpetuation of systems that marginalized Native Americans, even to this day. For example, the National Institute of Health reports [that](https://substack.com/redirect/e97b8f21-955d-4903-a23b-1d06fc1fb585?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg):
> More than one in five Native Americans (23 percent) reported experiencing discrimination in clinical encounters, while 15 percent avoided seeking health care for themselves or family members due to anticipated discrimination. A notable share of Native Americans also reported they or family members have experienced violence (38 percent) or have been threatened or harassed (34 percent). In adjusted models, Native Americans had higher odds than whites of reporting discrimination across several domains, including health care and interactions with the police/courts. In exploratory analyses, the association between geographic/neighborhood characteristics and discrimination among Native Americans was mixed.
This Thanksgiving Day, or National Day of Mourning, presents us an opportunity to recognize these perpetuating injustices and work to counter them.
What does that look like?
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..N29NxoSB3wDY9tm_iFBChsJXfsIaBBssFjGoozzkNuk?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=152268642)
## Take Action to Support Indigenous Communities
Indeed, we must take meaningful steps to support Indigenous Peoples. So, [here are seven things you can do today](https://substack.com/redirect/4d336fd3-d268-459e-af49-4ac4bb1e3ca0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). The linked list provides direct access to specific organizations, causes, and funds at which to contribute your time and resources. Take a moment to read through, and pick one action to take--and then publicize that action and ask others to match your effort.
Today should be a call to remember the rich histories and cultures of the Native Americans who lived in these lands long before European colonization ignited a arguably the largest genocide in modern world history. It should also be a call to action to invest meaningful resources, and for each of us to do our small part to help turn the tide of injustice.
## Conclusion
It is long past time for the United States to properly honor Native Americans. [President Biden's formal apology for US Government run Indian boarding schools](https://substack.com/redirect/2c734939-7b91-485d-a15e-17b3d948bafa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) is a step, but woefully insufficient in providing meaningful economic, social, and practical resources to undo centuries of historical wrongs. And like Indigenous Peoples' Day, which takes place earlier in the year, the National Day of Mourning is not just about correcting historical wrongs. It is also about recognizing the resilience and contributions of Native Americans and creating space for a more truthful understanding of American history. This holiday serves as an opportunity for reflection, learning, and respect for the people who were the original stewards of this land. As we give thanks this day, let us also spend the day learning about the cultures, histories, and ongoing struggles of Indigenous peoples, and what we can do to help restore even an iota of justice denied.

clean_body: It 's Nancy Mace, and I'm not backing down. The Radical Left, led by AOC, islosing their minds over something as basic as keeping NAKED MEN out of WOMEN 'S PRIVATE SPACES. They're twisting the truth --like they ALWAYS do. AOC is RALLYING Americans AGAINST ME. She called my stance "GROSS" and said "EVERYONE SHOULD REJECT IT." Let that sink in. The Left thinks protecting girls is "GROSS." They want to throw open the doors of women 's bathrooms and locker rooms to men, all in the name of their twisted agenda. This isn't just absurd -- it's an attack on every woman and girl in America. But I'm NOT backing down. J.K. Rowling is with me. Speaker Mike Johnson is with me. THOUSANDS of Americans are with me -- men and women standing together to say ENOUGH IS ENOUGH. And guess what? IT 'S WORKING. This is just the beginning. America is waking up, and we're taking back our common sense. But I need YOU with me to keep up this fight. Peter, will you stand with me and Join the fight. America's daughters are depending on us. Sign your name and chip in! We're making HISTORY! Paid for by Team Mace. NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. Team Mace, 824 S. Milledge Ave., Ste. 101, Athens, GA, 30605

name: Lateefah Simon
subject: Grateful for you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lateefah for Congress
body:
https://www.lateefahsimon.com [https://www.lateefahsimon.com]
Friend – Happy Thanksgiving!
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lateefah-for-congress-uplift?refcode=X_112824_thanksgiving [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lateefah-for-congress-uplift?refcode=X_112824_thanksgiving]
This year has been a whirlwind of emotions. While many of us are heartbroken by the outcome of this year’s national election, we know what our job is: to lace up our shoes, dig in, and get ready to fight for all that is good.
As we gather with our families this week, let’s hold tight to the knowledge that our values are the right values — justice, equality, and community. Together, we will keep fighting - no matter the challenges ahead.
I am so thankful for each of you, for your belief in this campaign, and for your unwavering support. I’m ready to represent our district and this great nation, working together to create the future we all deserve.
Wishing you a day of gratitude, strength, and, of course, plenty of pie.
With love and determination,
Lateefah

Now, as a 25-year veteran organizer and nationally recognized advocate for civil rights and social justice, she’s running to take this fight to Congress. In Lateefah, CA-12 has a fighter.
To learn more about Lateefah, visit LateefahSimon.com [http://lateefahsimon.com/]

name: Angela Alsobrooks
subject: Happy Thanksgiving!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alsobrooks for Senate
body:
[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/2571?t=1006&akid=3226%2E52803%2EAndukb ][IMG]

I hope you’re spending your day surrounded by friends and family and
enjoying some delicious food,
Peter, so I’ll try to keep this
quick.

Thanksgiving is special, because it’s a reminder to slow down every once
in a while and take stock of all that we have to be grateful for.

I think it’s especially important when you’ve just won a grassroots
campaign, because the phrase “I wouldn’t be here without you” is truly an
understatement.

It’s your support – your energy, your enthusiasm, your engagement, and
your generosity – that elected me as the next U.S. Senator from Maryland.

So this Thanksgiving, I’m grateful for my family, my friends, my staff,
and this amazing grassroots team that has supported me from day 1.

Thank you, Peter, and I hope you have a lovely Thanksgiving!

—Angela

name: George Latimer
subject: Happy Thanksgiving!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by George Latimer for Congress
body:
George Latimer is a lifelong Westchester resident who has built a career in public service by delivering unparalleled progressive results for local residents. Now, he's taking that work to the next level by running to represent New York's 16th District in Congress. If you’d like to unsubscribe, click here. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/-Phg2RhDIEGJVPbb5vK87g2?unsubscribedata=UMJeYFvzpF%2FmTqI8KSqyTGd%2FKhDH7Z5fSPPvAgbcLqrsLFL35%2FCYCHFMtZUuE2kx8VcvFRfEKSMXLd21cG3WEFOtOJtpBny5GGNwrU8TQgqR8cuM391B%2BibVpOUAHtBtLYnh29fz8qnKXHLXfzwMZxn4tNCSXsrPbYG47TxpQC3ieHzX95nqL9i%2BiG6b99YqIHjzXoElaKW6zSJL90pQgJ3gar5Xw4NV%2FEpJCiKuN54Mo5Dh7IFZg%2Fh9vndy3z2DFck7tv%2FrDTkhmozq%2Ffv5s6QJS3g5icWTs%2BqqA4E5mFSnYgLzgejkq9rsH0cdoqO0bSw4WZkZ8QLL3mIe7GMP2KGH0zI67Bc3RwWw6hfwi9SK1D33w1PRG5Z%2BRn8Iz7bMcqpx92YQzGHq%2B%2BiHKoLlE4%2BE8Z4%2BJ241uqam%2BpukpAjiQzbQHX9ucpwRoLe7RF31]

# [#]
Hey Peter, it’s George.

As we gather around the table breaking bread with our loved ones today, I want to take a moment to extend my gratitude to you.

The support you have shown me throughout my campaign has been immeasurable. After a whirlwind campaign, I am NY-16’s Congressman-elect — and that is because of your unwavering commitment to restoring real results over rhetoric.

It is an honor to have supporters like you by my side, and an even greater honor to be your voice in Congress. I am immensely grateful to you and am eager to continue accomplishing our goals for working families in NY-16, and beyond.

Peter: Happy Thanksgiving to you and yours!

Thank you, always.

— George Latimer
https://www.facebook.com/LatimerforNY [https://www.facebook.com/LatimerforNY] https://twitter.com/LatimerforNY [https://twitter.com/LatimerforNY]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/latimer-em-footer-23 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/latimer-em-footer-23]
For over three decades, George Latimer has been a champion for progressive policies and leaders, helping lead the effort to make Westchester, a formerly solid Republican County, into a blue firewall that has withstood multiple red waves in recent years. George’s unparalleled track record in advancing Democratic goals includes successfully cutting regressive taxes, fighting for civil rights and racial equality, defending a woman’s right to choose, standing up to the NRA to keep guns off our streets, and voting for marriage equality.

name: Kari Lake
subject: A Personal and Urgent Message
disclaimer_text: Paid for by American Media Council
body:
The Left wanted to force me to pay a multi-million-dollar legal judgment because I told the truth and called out election fraud. | | |
---
| |
---
| |
---
#
---

name: John + Gisele Fetterman
subject: Happy Thanksgiving from our family to yours
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
[1]John Fetterman

Happy Thanksgiving,
Derek. ❤️

Before we sit down to eat with August, Karl, and Gracie, we wanted to take
a couple minutes to share just a few of the things we’re grateful for this
holiday season.

First of all, we’re grateful that our family is safe, healthy, and
together to celebrate the holidays. After the journey we’ve been on for
the past few years, we know we can’t always take that for granted.

And after a long campaign season, we’re also grateful that the holidays
give us a chance to slow down and enjoy each other’s company for a little
while.

Finally, we’re grateful for YOU. Every person who’s sent us well wishes
and supported John’s work for Pennsylvanians in the Senate these past
couple years has a special place in our hearts, and we can’t thank you
enough.

So Derek, we
hope you have a happy, healthy, and safe Thanksgiving, from our family to
yours. 🦃

John + Gisele Fetterman

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1001&akid=9632%2E434096%2EbOnohV

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

After the journey we’ve been on for the past few years, we know we can’t always take that for granted. # FROM THE DESK OF LARRY KUDLOW
---
| | Reader,**I am pleased to share with you that The New York Sun, one of my daily must-read papers, is now the exclusive publisher of my regular columns.

I invite you to consider joining the Sun to receive unlimited access to my latest commentary, alongside some of the finest American journalism.

**But there's also far more to what the Sun is building.

As you know, journalism isn't what it used to be.

I've been in the business for decades, and never before have I seen this once noble profession so abused. The major papers are no longer on the side of the American people, and we are right to withhold our trust.

The impact on our democracy is considerable. Without real accountability, the worst actors in government and at corporate institutions have free reign, and patriotic, hard-working Americans are being sidelined and ignored.

The antidote is to join the movement to build a better alternative. That's the American way.

**The charge to restore American journalism is being led by the Sun.** A proudly all-American, principled publication that has plenty of room for conservative thought and conservative writers, the Sun has upheld the highest journalistic standards since 1833. That's 18 years before the New York Times published its first number.**My decision for the New York Sun to become the exclusive publisher of my regular columns was not taken lightly.**

I value their work and have been impressed by their team, but I know they have a hell of a battle ahead. They are the David facing many Goliaths.

They will only succeed if we join with them in this grassroots national effort. Joining the Sun costs as little as a penny a day. I encourage you to sign up today. Every single person counts.
---

body:

Hi Peter, Happy Thanksgiving! After a year of so much uncertainty, it’s more important than ever that we show gratitude for the many blessings in our lives. **So, I just want to share how thankful I am for you, Peter.** Supporters like you have been the backbone of my mission — and propelled me to greater heights than I thought possible. Together, we have accomplished so much to uplift the common good and ensure progress prevails in NC-04, and beyond. I’m so honored to have supporters like you by my side. Thanks to you, I am serving another term in Congress fighting for climate action, reproductive justice, equity in education, and so much more. I cannot express my gratitude enough, Peter. I hope your Thanksgiving is joyous, surrounded by loved ones, and filled with delicious meals. Thank you, Valerie

name: Katie Porter
subject: All families deserve a full holiday table
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Truth to Power PAC
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/9?t=1&akid=39332%2E3422442%2EJZ8iCH)
Derek,
So many of us are so busy today—busy cooking, catching up with loved ones, or sharing a delicious meal together.
But, we should remember that being busy, in some ways, means being lucky.
Too many families aren’t busy prepping and cooking today, because too many families are struggling to put a meal on the table.
As we appreciate the blessings in our lives, let’s also remember those who are not so fortunate. This Thanksgiving, I’m supporting No Kid Hungry to help families in need, so that they can take part in this festive season too.
**[Will you join me today in making a donation to No Kid Hungry? Your support will help all families have the chance to celebrate this season with full tables and full hearts.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ttp-em-20241128?refcode=em20241128-39332&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39332_3422442_JZ8iCH&akid=39332%2E3422442%2EJZ8iCH)**
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ttp-em-20241128?refcode=em20241128-39332&refcode2=39332_3422442_JZ8iCH&akid=39332%2E3422442%2EJZ8iCH)
Thank you, and happy holidays!
Katie

**Katie Porter started Truth to Power to support Democrats who reject corporate PAC money** and are running to protect the environment, restore the nationwide right to an abortion, and create an economy that works for working people. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/truth-to-power-1?refcode=em20241128-39332&amounts=&t=2&refcode2=39332_3422442_JZ8iCH&akid=39332%2E3422442%2EJZ8iCH)**

name: Hillary Holley | Care in Action
subject: Thank you for your care
body:
Your work is essential to the thankfulness that we all feel today.
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97817925/514678396/664783965?ms=112824_thankyou&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NDI0NWQwYi1iNGFkLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=svTRoc4-YGjXbONDqNhPM7W9Ya6erafHr7ERN9WvRt8=&emci=0deb813e-5bab-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=84245d0b-b4ad-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=864787)
Dear Peter,
Today, while millions of families are gathering together, we’re thinking about our depth of gratitude for care workers and caregivers.
**Care work is the essential work that makes everything else possible.**
Whether you are caring for your relatives over the holiday, or are working over the holiday to help make another family’s memories possible, **your work is essential to the thankfulness that we all feel today.**
This past year, we’ve been through a tough election cycle and now there are many challenges ahead of us. But we’re grateful to newly-elected officials like Senator-Elect Ruben Gallego, and Care Champions like Representative Jim Clyburn, for standing with and speaking up for care workers and families.
And we’re thankful for the thousands of volunteers who worked tirelessly to knock on doors for care in the lead-up to the election. **Our wins would not have been possible without you.**
We hope you have a restful holiday!
Hillary Holley
Executive Director | Care in Action
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97817928/514678397/-1554439957?ms=112824_thankyou&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NDI0NWQwYi1iNGFkLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=svTRoc4-YGjXbONDqNhPM7W9Ya6erafHr7ERN9WvRt8=&emci=0deb813e-5bab-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=84245d0b-b4ad-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=864787) [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97817930/514678398/326371895?ms=112824_thankyou&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NDI0NWQwYi1iNGFkLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=svTRoc4-YGjXbONDqNhPM7W9Ya6erafHr7ERN9WvRt8=&emci=0deb813e-5bab-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=84245d0b-b4ad-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=864787) [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97817932/514678399/955979663?ms=112824_thankyou&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NDI0NWQwYi1iNGFkLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=svTRoc4-YGjXbONDqNhPM7W9Ya6erafHr7ERN9WvRt8=&emci=0deb813e-5bab-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=84245d0b-b4ad-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=864787)

name: Gwen Moore (personal)
subject: Wishing you a Happy Thanksgiving!
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Gwen Moore for Congress Gwen Moore for Congress
body:
Happy Thanksgiving to you and yours!| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97818295/514679177/1322170159?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS85MzczOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZTcyYzc1Ny1iNWFkLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eNSu5pXu35xo1d4LSBVNRX8PCTfGzWRKux5424G5lEs=&emci=1eb0eb89-b4ad-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=2e72c757-b5ad-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=1486204)
---
| | Peter, Happy Thanksgiving to you and yours! Today is truly the melting pot holiday, where people from all over come together to celebrate our shared blessings. While some may continue trying to divide us, there is nothing that will ever put a halt to the America I know and cherish. We are a diverse nation that flourishes because we accept all people, from every corner of the world. We accept them with open arms because it is the right thing to do. On this Thanksgiving, I am thankful for so many things. I am thankful for my family and my friends. I am thankful for the brave men and women who protect our nation every day. I am thankful for the opportunity to be your voice in Congress. Together America, #WeRepresent!
---
| |
---
Proudly representing Wisconsin's 4th Congressional District Proud Co-Leader of the Violence Against Women Act 100% Pro-Choice 100% Democracy Defender
---
|
---
The first African-American woman in Wisconsin history to serve in the U.S. House of Representatives, Congresswoman Gwen Moore, took her official oath of office on January 4, 2005. She served in the Wisconsin State Senate from 1993-2004. Before her election to the Senate, Congresswoman Moore served two consecutive terms in the Wisconsin State Assembly from 1989-92.

clean_body: Happy Thanksgiving to you and yours!| | | | | Peter, Happy Thanksgiving to you and yours! Today is truly the melting pot holiday, where people from all over come together to celebrate our shared blessings. While some may continue trying to divide us, there is nothing that will ever put a halt to the America I know and cherish. We are a diverse nation that flourishes because we accept all people, from every corner of the world. We accept them with open arms because it is the right thing to do. On this Thanksgiving, I am thankful for so many things. I am thankful for my family and my friends. I am thankful for the brave men and women who protect our nation every day. I am thankful for the opportunity to be your voice in Congress. Together America, #WeRepresent! | | Proudly representing Wisconsin's 4th Congressional District Proud Co-Leader of the Violence Against Women Act 100% Pro-Choice 100% Democracy Defender | The first African-American woman in Wisconsin history to serve in the U.S. House of Representatives, Congresswoman Gwen Moore, took her official oath of office on January 4, 2005. She served in the Wisconsin State Senate from 1993-2004. Before her election to the Senate, Congresswoman Moore served two consecutive terms in the Wisconsin State Assembly from 1989-92. = | | | = | =| = ---|---|--- Paid for and Authorized by Gwen Moore for Congress Gwen Moore for Congress P.O. name: MAGA Alert
subject: Trump’s Border Czar is already cracking heads.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Overhaul PAC
body:
| | | **Wow, Trump’s new Border Czar just left the Dems _SPEECHLESS!_** It didn’t take long for Tom Homan to start cracking heads. If the Left gets in his way, he’s ready to **LOCK THEM UP!** In case you missed it the Mayor of Denver said he’s willing to go to jail just to get in Trump's way. And this is what Tom Homan had to say. _"You are absolutely breaking the law... But, look, me and the Denver mayor, we agree on one thing. He’s willing to go to jail, I’m willing to put him in jail."_ **WOW!** We finally have someone willing to do what it takes to **GET THE JOB DONE!** These sanctuary Mayors and Governors have been putting this country in danger for too long. And now we have someone willing to put them in their place. We are proud to stand behind Tom Homan and we are going to do everything we can to get him appointed. And you can help us. Trump’s appointments will have to get over one more hurdle before they can **MAGA!** And that’s the Senate. Each one will need to get confirmed before they can get to work. That might be easier said than done. We won the Senate earlier this month, but if the Democrats flip even 4 votes it could be a **DISASTER for MAGA. ** We need to remind Republicans who put them in their office. _**THE AMERICAN PEOPLE.**_ And if they get in Trump's way we just as easily vote them out. So sign our petition today and help us send them this message: If you get in our way, **YOU’RE GONE!**
---

name: House DFL Team
subject: Giving thanks
disclaimer_text: paid for by the DFL House Caucus
body:
dflhouse.com [dflhouse.com]
Friend,
As I get ready to celebrate Thanksgiving with my family, I am reflecting on this past year and all that I have to be grateful for. You are a big part of that, friend.
I am thankful for all you've done to support our House DFL team. We may not have seen the results we wanted on Election Day, but we’re going to continue working to make a Minnesota that works better for everyone.
Thank you,
Melissa Hortman
Speaker of the House
Minnesota House of Representatives

Peter Willis — we’re
putting together a team.

Under Trump, we know how important it will be to have a D.C Rapid Response
Team ready to mobilize to stop his disastrous policy agenda.

That’s why we’ve started putting together this group of high level
organizers to show up to the Capitol as we campaign against Trump’s worst
appointments, like Elon Musk, Dr. Oz, and Project 2025 leaders — and his
dangerous policies, like destroying Medicare, the National Labor Relations
Board, environmental protections, and public education.

We’ve already got hundreds of sign-ups for our Rapid Response Team, and
know it will take a lot more and massive resources to make this organizing
effort successful.

must keep fighting. We will mobilize protests, jam phone lines, expose

subject: From my family to yours

body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97818680/514679978/476240633?amount=5&refcode=em_msg_2024.11.28_b1_jb_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODY5YzI3OTItYjZhZC1lZjExLTg4Y2YtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZDI5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=39wo1BIE8DP72Nf5k1k6rbMWoKC_WnPabTj1LWSwxbE=) Happy Thanksgiving, friends! This holiday season is always a meaningful time for my family, but this year especially, I feel overwhelmed with gratitude. I wanted to take a moment to express how thankful I am for you. Together, we made history in Oregon, and I’m so grateful for the opportunity to serve as your Congresswoman for Oregon’s 5th Congressional District. It means the world to me that you’re in this fight with me. So once again, thank you for being part of my team. >From my family to yours, I hope you have a safe and happy Thanksgiving! With gratitude, Janelle

---

body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97819045/514680649/985656575?nd&amount=10&refcode=em_fr_2024.11.28_b1_es_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDE4N2RmOC1iN2FkLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5RJF_R-yVYK7ATOPWWIQha9FF_bcEX9iHUVMNQxhQBo=) Peter, Happy Thanksgiving! I want to take a moment to wish you all a happy Thanksgiving today as we gather with friends and family to celebrate one another. Thanksgiving reminds us to appreciate all of life's moments. I am so appreciative of this team and for the opportunity to spend another two years in Congress working for everyone in OH-13. I know just how important community is, and that family comes first. Spending time with family and friends is what the holidays are all about. And I know that groceries and Thanksgiving dinner, gas to visit your loved ones, and everyday costs are too high. That’s why I am going to continue working hard in Congress to lower costs, empower families, and expand opportunity for all. I hope you have a Happy Thanksgiving. Thank you for all your support. _Emilia Sykes_

| **A native of Akron, Ohio, Emilia Sykes has deep roots fighting for Ohioans. She learned from a young age how to use her voice and the power of the people to create change.** **In 2022, Congresswoman Sykes was elected to represent Ohio’s newly redrawn 13th Congressional District, winning one of the toughest races in the country._Emilia has cut through the divisiveness to deliver results._ **

name: Kim Schrier
subject: From my family to yours:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
Happy Thanksgiving 🦃🍂 [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97819599/514682334/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZmQyZmM5Zi1iYWFkLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sO622w0YU47SkpkPqoummXo_gVSoizbBG0cvYeUzsnc=&emci=21bb4e45-2aac-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=9fd2fc9f-baad-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=15820338)
---
Peter,

As families across the country gather to celebrate Thanksgiving, _I want to take a moment to share what I’m especially grateful for this year:_

I’m thankful for my husband, David, and my son, Sam, who bring so much love and joy into my life and give me the strength to fight for our district every day. I’m thankful for the people of Washington’s 8th District who continue to trust me to represent them in Congress. It’s an honor I never take for granted.

And I’m deeply thankful for you, Peter. Whether you’ve knocked on doors, shared our campaign’s message, or chipped in any amount to support our work, your dedication fuels everything we do. **We truly couldn’t have done any of this without your dedicated support.** I’m also incredibly grateful for my staff, who work tirelessly alongside me to help families in WA-08. From assisting constituents in times of crisis to advancing the issues that matter most, _their commitment to this community inspires me every day._

So, however you’re celebrating this Thanksgiving – **whether you’re enjoying an extra slice of pie, gathering with loved ones, or simply taking some time to relax – I want you to know how much I appreciate having you on this team.**

Wishing you and your family a safe and happy Thanksgiving!

– Kim | Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
---

name: Marie Gluesenkamp Perez
subject: So grateful
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marie for Congress
body:
| | Peter,

From my family to yours: Happy Thanksgiving!

We have a lot to be thankful for this year. I’m especially grateful for the ongoing support from folks like you.

Whether you joined us in the field to knock on doors and make phone calls, or shared our posts on social media to raise awareness of our campaign, or chipped in even a few dollars to support our efforts – I know how lucky I am to have you on our team, and I can’t thank you enough.

It’s an honor to serve WA-03 in Congress for another term, and I’m looking forward to everything we will accomplish together on the road ahead.

Let’s all take this opportunity to reflect and give thanks – and eat lots of great food, of course.

Peter, I hope you and your family have a safe and happy holiday.

– Marie

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Happy Thanksgiving
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
Opening our homes and adding as many chairs as we can to the table is how we’ll fuel our fight ahead

| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=2423%2E4032634%2ElVVu0t)
---
I hope that you’re able to find comfort in this holiday season. Spending time with the people we love, opening our homes and adding as many chairs as we can to the table, giving back to our communities in ways big and small, and finding moments of gratitude — these are the things that will fuel our fight ahead. Today I’m grateful for everyone who fought hard this year to try to build an America of our best values. For those who got out of their comfort zones, taking time out of their weekends to phonebank or drive to another state to knock on doors, and connected with strangers to talk about what this election meant. For the supporters who took out their wallets and pitched in a donation to support a campaign they believed in — to stop Washington from only working for the rich and powerful. For the people who had tough conversations with the people in their circles. For the campaign staffers and volunteers who worked tirelessly — putting their personal lives and priorities on hold — to push for a system of good, effective government that helps people. This all mattered, and will continue to matter as we move forward. I’m grateful for the people of Massachusetts for putting their faith in me to be their Senator — and for making our Commonwealth the special place that it is for all of us. I’m grateful for Bruce, Bailey, my family, and the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau. I’m grateful for everyone on this team — you — and our shared belief in dreaming big, fighting hard, and making big, structural change together. Rest up, enjoy your food and time with family, and please, do something for your community this weekend. Make a Giving Tuesday gift to an organization close to your heart. Support small businesses as you do your holiday shopping. Research organizations to volunteer with this season and into the new year. We’ll talk soon. Have a happy Thanksgiving, Elizabeth

---
| | | |
---

If you thought Jaguar’s latest ad campaign would showcase sleek cars roaring down winding roads, think again. Instead, we’re treated to artsy phrases [...] The sparks were flying on CNN when Oklahoma Superintendent of Public Instruction Ryan Walters went toe-to-toe with Pamela Brown over incorporating the Bible and Ten Commandments into public school curricula. Walters, an unapologetic advocate for blending faith and education, stood firm against what he called the “gaslighting from the left,” making it clear that he’s [...] P.O. Box 455, Leesburg, VA 20178 No longer want to receive the Liberty Ledger? Unsubscribe .

name: Brian Lenney
subject: ok, here goes...
body:
|
---
| | A holiday message from your friendly neighborhood Senator...

I'm thankful beyond words that we’re standing on the brink of watching Big Pharma get absolutely obliterated—steamrolled and curb-stomped into a smoldering ruin of its former greed-driven empire.

Thankful that the hollow shell of the Biden regime is finally slipping into the twilight, dragging its inept DEI failed VP zealot sidekick out the door. The era of smug, destructive cultural experiments and woke virtue-signaling is coming to an end, and the reckoning is here.

Thankful that America’s collective backbone is stiffening, that the woke mob and their cultural Marxist fever dream are being laughed off the stage in record numbers. The curtain is falling on this divisive garbage, and people are waking up to what truly matters.

Thankful that we’re on the verge of reclaiming our sovereignty—securing our borders and taking back control from illegal invaders who’ve been leeching off the system and sowing chaos across our nation. It’s time to restore law & order, dignity, moral courage, and a real future for hard working Americans.

Most of all, thankful for the unfathomable grace of God, who, despite our endless stumbles, shows us patience and love. His guidance is a beacon as we fumble toward living out His will on earth, even in the middle of so much turmoil.

The fight’s tough but REAL hope is unshakable and forever. Keep your eyes fixed on Jesus—He’s the rock that stands firm no matter how wild, dark, or crazy things get. Put your hope in heaven, where every bit of this chaos we’re dealing with now will finally make sense (one day).

And whatever you do, don’t let despair rule you. Forget the blackpill—take the Clown Pill instead and learn to laugh at the insanity of the world we live in, because it’s temporary and will all fade away someday.

Trust God, lean into faith, and live in hope.

Cheers,

Brian

\---

3) My postal address: PO Box 3753, Nampa, ID 83653-3753

4) **Want to support the fight against the establishment hacks, phony conservatives, and progressive shills who want to turn Idaho into a progressive dumpster fire? >>> [Click here to contribute](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=de65352afa&e=dea908e0fe "get in the fight")**

**TO: President Joe and First Lady Jill Biden
FROM: Peter Willis
Subject: Happy Thanksgiving! 🦃**

Dear President Joe Biden and First Lady Jill Biden,

This Thanksgiving, I am so thankful for everything you’ve done for the American people over the last four years.

Our Democracy has been under constant attack, and you’ve been right there to defend it at every turn. You've led us through a pandemic, a massive economic recovery, sharp political division, and SAVED our Democracy from the brink of peril.

You’ve continuously faced attacks from MAGA Republicans with so much dignity and grace. You both deserve to have an amazing holiday season after all of the hard work you’ve put in over the last few years.

Jimmy

Dear Peter,
---
The Democrat Deep State wants **$146 MILLION** from me – all because I dared to ask questions about the legitimacy of America’s elections.
---
To comply with such a frivolous demand, I’d have to give up **_everything_** I own – including my dignity.
---
That’s why I have **officially _APPEALED_** this outrageous ruling that would leave me on the streets.
---
_As I stand on the brink of losing everything, I remind myself that the Bible says that earthly possessions will always fade, but greater “heavenly treasures” await us._
---
Truth, justice, and the fight for freedom are worth _infinitely_ more... They are the “heavenly treasures... that cannot be stolen and will never rust, decay or lose their value.”
---
**And when I see that TWO of the rigged cases brought against President Trump have now been dismissed and “delayed indefinitely,” I have hope that I can win mine too!**
---
_But my ability to win this appeal and stay in this fight until justice is served depends entirely on the support given to me by kind souls like you, Peter._
---
Let me also say that I know we’re in the midst of the holidays, so family and friends come first. Please don’t feel pressured to give if you can’t!
---

clean_body: I will continue to fight this injustice. | Dear Peter, The Democrat Deep State wants $146 MILLION from me – all because I dared to ask questions about the legitimacy of America’s elections. To comply with such a frivolous demand, I’d have to give up everything I own – including my dignity. That’s why I have officially APPEALED this outrageous ruling that would leave me on the streets. As I stand on the brink of losing everything, I remind myself that the Bible says that earthly possessions will always fade, but greater “heavenly treasures” await us. Truth, justice, and the fight for freedom are worth infinitely more... They are the “heavenly treasures... that cannot be stolen and will never rust, decay or lose their value.” And when I see that TWO of the rigged cases brought against President Trump have now been dismissed and “delayed indefinitely,” I have hope that I can win mine too! But my ability to win this appeal and stay in this fight until justice is served depends entirely on the support given to me by kind souls like you, Peter. Let me also say that I know we’re in the midst of the holidays, so family and friends come first. Please don’t feel pressured to give if you can’t! Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust |

| Happy Thanksgiving!

I want to extend my gratitude to you for supporting this campaign through a challenging election cycle. Your support propelled this campaign to victory once again–re-electing a pro-choice woman to Congress at a time when reproductive rights are under fierce attack.

I’m spending Thanksgiving with some of my biggest supporters: my husband Jesse and our sons, James and Wesley. I could not be here without them by my side.

I hope your day, like mine, is filled with loved ones, good food, and endless gratitude.

With deep appreciation,

Hillary

name: Scott Fitzgerald
subject: Happy Thanksgiving
body:
| | |
---
| | Happy Thanksgiving, Peter! **This year, there is so much to be thankful for. ** I'm thankful for my family, my country, and the men and women who serve in our communities and abroad, who keep us safe. I'm also thankful for you and for the support you've given me over the last year as I fought once again to represent Wisconsin and America in Congress. Wishing you and your family a safe and wonderful Thanksgiving,
**Scott Fitzgerald**
---
|

name: George Whitesides
subject: Thankful
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gw-q4-2024?refcode=em-header [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gw-q4-2024?refcode=em-header]
Happy Thanksgiving, Peter!

I have much to be grateful for, especially this year.

I’m thankful for my wife and kids who have been so supportive from the very beginning of this campaign. And I know they’re awfully thankful they won’t have to see another campaign ad this year.

I’m thankful to the people of this district for their trust and votes. I couldn’t be more grateful, and it’s the honor of my lifetime to serve my community in our nation's capital.

I’m thankful for you too, Peter.

Your commitment over the past year is how we made history and flipped this district. Every door knocked, dollar donated, even your conversations with friends and neighbors all added up to a winning effort.

As we gear up for the year ahead and its challenges, I want you to know that I don’t take your support for granted. Our work together is just getting started.

I look forward to delivering for CA-27, listening to your concerns, and being your voice in Washington.

Thank you,

George
https://www.facebook.com/whitesidesforcongress/? [https://www.facebook.com/whitesidesforcongress/?] https://www.instagram.com/whitesidesforcongress/? [https://www.instagram.com/whitesidesforcongress/?] https://twitter.com/gtwhitesides? [https://twitter.com/gtwhitesides?]George has spent his career solving problems. name: Jay Jones
subject: Celebrating those we love
body:
jayjones.com [jayjones.com]
Team Jones,
This Thanksgiving, I am taking time to reflect on all the things I’m thankful for. My wife Mavis and our two wonderful sons, my family, and the ability to serve the great state of Virginia.
I am also incredibly grateful to everyone who has already supported my campaign to become Virginia’s next Attorney General. Whether you’ve spread the message about my candidacy or donated your hard-earned dollars to get my campaign off the ground, I appreciate the community that has rallied behind me.
This has been a tough year and a lot remains uncertain, but there are so many bright spots. I hope you’ll take some time for yourself to think about what brings you joy.
Grateful for you,
Jay

Jay Jones for Virginia
PO Box 2501
Arlington, VA 22202
United States

name: Dr. Raul Ruiz
subject: A note on this special day
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE
body:
While Washington remains gridlocked, Dr. Raul Ruiz is committed to serving and helping constituents with the problems they have with the federal government and cutting red tape. If you’d like to unsubscribe, click here. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/dAfRehWDrkq5GdVTndjWgA2?unsubscribedata=ZB1XDP0sRAzVIqF9miHxGozAWsHBz1YnP%2F8I6jUjjATOXqtSUvNRQ2nPMftxHN%2BV0DyDoDCligMaINlZJ0t8eVfHbqrwPrCe56n%2FPjPYXN%2FJ6Q3YRhgBimjd3bnkHgDBiexFzBxy3lL%2FMkTlblAf5nhxjR3s%2Bxa1uToP8G32v%2B8qEducd8jjg2L7WHvZdLG0leY0%2FMYzOYRaH4NnzdyqzZCNTTcD2PBb9tNMV93MWNCpp8T%2BcLrQfk0PWSPNGLDBhSfEym4ZEvu4OHGoE1AsThmxCzqPtzLoBnQLzeAlw1ykVRp1NNtuwmpw4n70FRN4xlHNOjbUOOP1YJ7W3CgTtk3Jciqe1wCWMSu5nStD0MfWSOEWwGGL98JXjYnnxBV5JtuB4EhhqnhbN%2F%2FwOTYpRxFpDzy%2Fhauv%2FpIJH1oRsn1cIdvLmU%2B4Fhi9yGSbu%2FnI]

# [#]
Hi there,

Today, as we gather with loved ones to give thanks, I want to let you know just how grateful I am for you.

This past month has been an emotional rollercoaster — happy for my win, sad for Kamala’s loss — but overall I am immensely grateful and thankful for you and your willingness to fight the good fight with me through good times and bad. On this special Thanksgiving, I wanted to personally reach out and thank you for being in this fight with us. Whether you are celebrating with friends, family, or are by yourself, I hope you have the opportunity to rest and relax during this holiday season.

You and the countless resilient others who still have the audacity to hope are my inspiration and motivation to work harder than ever in the years to come, and I’m more proud than ever to represent you and all of California’s 25th once more.

From my family to yours, Happy Thanksgiving!

Sincerely,
Raul
https://www.facebook.com/DrRaulRuiz/ [https://www.facebook.com/DrRaulRuiz/] https://www.instagram.com/doctorraulruiz [https://www.instagram.com/doctorraulruiz] https://twitter.com/Dr_RaulRuiz [https://twitter.com/Dr_RaulRuiz]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruiz-em-fr-footer [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruiz-em-fr-footer]
The son of hardworking farmworkers, Dr. Ruiz grew up in Coachella, CA and learned at an early age that the key to attaining the American Dream is hard work and a great education. In the summer of 1990, Raul walked in the desert heat from business to business in the Coachella Valley asking them to invest in their community by contributing to his education. With each investment for college, he made a promise to come back home and serve his community as a physician. In 2012, he decided to take his service to the community to the next level by running for Congress. Dr. Ruiz needs our help to continue fighting for us in Congress and to flip the House blue this November.

name: Austin Davis
subject: Grateful for you this Thanksgiving
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF AUSTIN DAVIS** | [**DONATE >>**](https://click
body:
A quick note | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97821687/514688990/497247908?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4N2EyNjQ5OS1jN2FkLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k0N8ZDFqdiLKtjSw11QElFzg4QUHbtB-Xgupg7akUn8=&emci=413be092-f4ac-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=87a26499-c7ad-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=31337995) Dear Peter, As we gather with loved ones this Thanksgiving, I want to take a moment to express how grateful I am for you and all we’ve accomplished together. This year has been challenging, but through it all, I’ve witnessed the resilience, compassion, and strength that define Pennsylvanians. **It’s a privilege to stand alongside you as we work to protect our shared values and build a brighter future for our Commonwealth.** I’m especially thankful for the communities we’ve built — neighbors helping neighbors, volunteers showing up to make a difference, and supporters like you who believe in a better tomorrow. Your dedication inspires me every day, and it’s a reminder that progress is always possible when we come together. As we pause to reflect on what matters most, I want you to know how deeply I value your partnership in this journey. Whether it’s protecting rights, strengthening our democracy, or investing in our children's future, none of it would be possible without your support. From my family to yours, I wish you a joyful Thanksgiving filled with warmth, love, and gratitude! Thank you, Austin Davis
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania
---

## **Happy Thanksgiving**
---
#### Very thankful for all my supporters this Thanksgiving.
#### We fought against the worst odds and lost by fraction of a percent. 2026 seems like it is really far out into the future.
#### In fact it will be here in no time.
#### Without all the wonderful support, we would have never made it to this point.
#### Proving that we can go toe to toe with the darkest dark money. They spent $15 million in Alaska and $150 million in the United States to push Ranked Choice Voting.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97823076/514692244/-1590518309?nvep&hmac&emci=e4a5842b-3eab-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNTkyMDNmYS1kMGFkLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-5gSwUY26CUZbOgluzQj1wbvjbT4AvAxGTM0BuFkaag=&ceid=7878003) Friend, Before we hit the dinner table today, I wanted to take a moment to reflect on everything we’ve accomplished over the past year. Most of all, I want to share my sincere gratitude to you, friend, and our incredible team. Thanksgiving is all about community, and I could not be more proud to be a part of this. Your dedication has helped us fight to protect our values and make a real change across the country. I am incredibly grateful to have such a strong community with me every step of the way. Your hard work and, most of all — your belief — are the backbone of everything we do. Let’s take this day to enjoy the company of our loved ones. And when I think about what I’m thankful for, I know I am endlessly grateful to have you on this journey. We’ve achieved a lot this year, and together, next year will be even better. I hope you and your loved ones have a day filled with joy and plenty of delicious food. Happy Thanksgiving! — Eric
|

name: David Horowitz
subject: The war on truth
body:
| | | Fellow Conservative, Are you concerned about the future of America?
---
| |
---
Fellow Conservative, Are you concerned about the future of America? Are you concerned that America’s history and values are under attack like never before? I am too. As you know, the radical Left lies and distorts the truth about our country... And these lies are threatening to undermine everything our nation once stood for... If they had it their way, the Left would have you believe America was founded as a “white supremacist” country and was built on the back of slavery. But this plot to distort the truth is just a part of their agenda to destroy our country as we know it and rebuild it with their radical socialist ideology. That’s why I wrote my latest book, **_America Betrayed: How a Christian Monk created America and why the Left is Determined to Destroy Her._** ...Because I’m fed up with the Left and their disingenuous schemes, and I wanted to reveal the **_true_** history of America’s unique contribution to human freedom dating all the way back to our founding. Ben Shapiro recently said the book is **_“totally worth the read.”_** If you want to hear what Ben Shapiro has to say about the book and the work of the David Horowitz Freedom Center, you can [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=86bb86618a184a7e96d916a9a21fbcf6&_e=B1PmtIbVn5bS6m__5R4sFdO_1HrJo5Z5cYHx5QNA9twFTJ-HuSjITiTq6lNnnXm3iR3hX05vwsY0r-_MJTGAXLp9aFFrijtaqqJuaFFesY0v889dY27d7Cfbsqzoj_jj6MsJulG4fqtjFpsUMtgySv8Heuh5tu9YmzXnWwI-q7JQ4hM0_GZfk464DkncpIUji4nafcdoJJ9ev4PDE41Qi1-7eIKPV033Nkpt0GKA9LE%3D)[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=86bb86618a184a7e96d916a9a21fbcf6&_e=B1PmtIbVn5bS6m__5R4sFaEPkysCVGP-bd6XEevum47wKcvTFPlSp6dGEU9Wn8pxI0TDC9JmXw41DZp4DyRr__HhU3vAZOMCtA4h56l5ciDq-6uzjolCVkMSayBVmxIdjbU3zh9-xs3JEGv0CAoE_FLKucJ7y_BLU4-ksnfI1QXNn1geIHaR3MqjmjC9SJX6V6GUZoMKdz1ZKH0saZe_bqxpyyJF6AqVbuhja_n5AQlxRFaGQPwxNMT40ONcqiFpnRcYgOkRPkhwLfCp12KYrI7DW6TpsRksMgFCQa0J9Ps%3D)[**watch his comments on YouTube here**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=86bb86618a184a7e96d916a9a21fbcf6&_e=B1PmtIbVn5bS6m__5R4sFaEPkysCVGP-bd6XEevum47wKcvTFPlSp6dGEU9Wn8pxI0TDC9JmXw41DZp4DyRr_5Or1lDBBTs6WKHNXhJDaQZ9fqkZ5cmo_z_JnA-6pm8C3nI0buZiMyLQCXABPI2VF8CWDgum7OMfOI2BQ4QcDgEZIMvFYRrEDKh8wBR8HmWy9qehedsz1bgK-HZLNTH0Gd3cqqQMC4955EyjVr1VImxYWP3mDC8cpa6F-JH8nGYtcJ_cPmQ8CHC-Qq8BStboKn-HidTH230wNCP_Xcupea6m2MQR5IcPTe-digrYG-kUqVWKLwbM6DOWpnBZtelb95y8UsmKnqh1EHVOlOMqwCPKZSzjGKqGWwcdGLQKZNY_dKXtoiKzpVtL6jYx8QSnGW2P29pn02YtvSjQ-1HRdQs%3D). I strongly believe the true American history the Left has fought so hard to bury will shock you. **[That’s why I want you to be one of the first to have a copy of my book.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=86bb86618a184a7e96d916a9a21fbcf6&_e=B1PmtIbVn5bS6m__5R4sFaEPkysCVGP-bd6XEevum47wKcvTFPlSp6dGEU9Wn8pxI0TDC9JmXw41DZp4DyRr_5Or1lDBBTs6WKHNXhJDaQZ9fqkZ5cmo_z_JnA-6pm8C3nI0buZiMyLQCXABPI2VF8CWDgum7OMfOI2BQ4QcDgEZIMvFYRrEDKh8wBR8HmWy9qehedsz1bgK-HZLNTH0Gd3cqqQMC4955EyjVr1VImxYWP3mDC8cpa6F-JH8nGYtWXbAZTZ-ddzWVcZMVr-xXbcQkgLorv4coQJfpX91g8OgSpb25PgSTET-0kqakF6OkT5VU-02rNCJDiWyr4QwnqitI3w0blSv6o_2PwOjdAAggrxy57Umny_y62TjsrWzTaBrYhLIQM5Xf4O8nn2PSqSURI3DORb3xTyqEzPsHeQ%3D)** Friend, this attack on our heritage is a deeply thought-out plan dating all the way back to the Communist Revolution in Russia. _Meaning this heinous attack on our nation has been going on for 100 years in the making._ And now it’s time you and I put it to a stop. **[**Equip yourself today with the truth by grabbing a copy of my book.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=86bb86618a184a7e96d916a9a21fbcf6&_e=B1PmtIbVn5bS6m__5R4sFaEPkysCVGP-bd6XEevum47wKcvTFPlSp6dGEU9Wn8pxI0TDC9JmXw41DZp4DyRr_5Or1lDBBTs6WKHNXhJDaQZ9fqkZ5cmo_z_JnA-6pm8C3nI0buZiMyLQCXABPI2VF8CWDgum7OMfOI2BQ4QcDgEZIMvFYRrEDKh8wBR8HmWy9qehedsz1bgK-HZLNTH0Gd3cqqQMC4955EyjVr1VImxYWP3mDC8cpa6F-JH8nGYtWJw5-IE67iKJJcyMuKAJBoH901YenzGrkROn4dY9j1NqMz4AnnvwPzIwHCj2jjSbHUrXBmVindf3JwUV3URy1ExwGgJBkhmfcHuYIr3IyasjFsXvLiswzxUgQXMulTyXV6jqKHBPtDoemk-98y8uIn98fQ5xRWijPmAbkDU-Gbk%3D)** Unfortunately, Barack Obama hit the gas pedal with his radical extremist presidency, providing the perfect launchpad for revisionist activists. Now the truth is harder than ever to find. And that’s why I’ve dedicated my entire life to exposing the agenda of the radical Left. Because I too once fell prey to their lies and deception– When I was a young man, about 50 years ago, I got sucked into the Marxist revolution and was one of the leaders bent on destroying all that makes America great. Regrettably, I stood side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. ...I edited _Ramparts_ , the radical Left’s largest magazine. ...I marched, wrote manifestos, and attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend, and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam. Through these horrible events, my eyes were opened to the incredible destruction and evil my “comrades” on the Left were responsible for. So, thanks to God, I cut all ties and never looked back! **I proudly cast my ballot for Ronald Reagan in 1984.** **Then I founded the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left and I’ve dedicated the last 40 years of my life to exposing their evil agenda.** _Why would I do that?_ Because, friend, I saw first-hand the threat the radical Left was to our country. I saw their evil beginnings and I knew if patriotic Americans stood by and did nothing, our country would soon be lost forever. This book is a vital defense against the malicious slanders the Left hopes will turn our country’s proud heritage into a shameful “white supremacist” story of lies.
---
**_Arming yourself with the truth is the best antidote to radical ideologies!_**

body:
I hope you’re enjoying a restful, joyous time with your friends, family and loved ones.

Gabe Vasquez won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022. He's running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone. Saludos, and happy Thanksgiving! I hope you’re enjoying a restful, joyous time with your friends, family and loved ones. Thanksgiving is best known as a time to gather with our loved ones and reflect on what we’re grateful for. **Today, I just want to share how thankful I am for you.** Since I first announced my bid for Congress back in 2021, supporters like you have been the engine of this campaign. Together, we build a people-driven movement to fight for representation that fights for New Mexico, our public lands, reproductive healthcare access and our democracy at large. And we’ve come a long way since then! → In 2022, we officially flipped NM-02 blue, and I am grateful and humbled to have been able to serve and fight for you in Congress. → This year, we kept NM-02 blue, showing the Republican establishment that New Mexicans resoundingly say NO to MAGA extremism and YES to democracy. That’s why I just want to say thank you today. I’m immensely grateful for you, and I can’t wait to take on the next two years with you. Now, I hope you have a wonderful Thanksgiving with your loved ones and delicious food. — Gabe
* * *

clean_body: I hope you’re enjoying a restful, joyous time with your friends, family and loved ones. Gabe Vasquez won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022. He's running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Saludos, and happy Thanksgiving! I hope you’re enjoying a restful, joyous time with your friends, family and loved ones. Thanksgiving is best known as a time to gather with our loved ones and reflect on what we’re grateful for. Today, I just want to share how thankful I am for you. Since I first announced my bid for Congress back in 2021, supporters like you have been the engine of this campaign. Together, we build a people-driven movement to fight for representation that fights for New Mexico, our public lands, reproductive healthcare access and our democracy at large. And we’ve come a long way since then! → In 2022, we officially flipped NM-02 blue, and I am grateful and humbled to have been able to serve and fight for you in Congress. → This year, we kept NM-02 blue, showing the Republican establishment that New Mexicans resoundingly say NO to MAGA extremism and YES to democracy. That’s why I just want to say thank you today. I’m immensely grateful for you, and I can’t wait to take on the next two years with you. Now, I hope you have a wonderful Thanksgiving with your loved ones and delicious food. — Gabe | | | ---|---|--- = Together, we flipped NM-02 in 2022. Now, Gabe is busy in Congress fighting for reproductive choice, economic opportunity, affordable healthcare, and the best interests of the people. Gabe won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022, and is running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone.** | = = Paid for by Gabe Vasquez for Congress Gabe Vasquez for Congress Drawer L Mesilla, NM 88046 United States If you would like to unsubscribe, click here: To receive less email from Gabe Vasquez for Congress, .
